programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: My Cat from Hell

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on people who keep all manner of animals as pets. In the first edition, a so-called lion whisperer in the Czech Republic talks about his big cats. Plus, the story of a Texan cowboy who lets buffalo roam in his house

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Fun facts about animals, including how swarms of blind bats avoid collision, whether mice really like cheese, why slugs are so slimy and what makes manatees farts so special

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How humpback whales are able to leap so far out of the water, why dogs tilt their heads and how do spiders shed their own skin. Plus, why do animals gather in swarms?

programme.title: Dawn Chorus: The Sounds of Spring
programme.desc: Filmed without voiceover or music, this programme highlights the call of the birds at sunrise, as those living within Britains habitats burst into song and reveal the natural splendour of their distinctive chorus

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The steeplejack looks at structures that have been built for arts, leisure and entertainment purposes, including the Globe Theatre, the Victoria and Albert Museum and Blackpool Tower

programme.title: Cornwalls Red River
programme.desc: Poet John Wedgwood Clarke explores the waterway, which is home to some rare and resilient wildlife despite being heavily polluted by centuries of tin mining. Extracts from Johns poem Red River at the A30 Culvert reveal his mixed thoughts about the rivers toxic legacy

programme.title: Top of the Pops

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast July 16, 1999. Including performances from Atb, Semisonic, Gary Barlow, Beverley Knight, and Ricky Martin

programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 BBC Radio 6 Music Festival, which took place at independent venues across Greater Manchester. Featuring performances from Bloc Party, Courtney Barnett, The Horrors, Jacob Alon, Kelly Lee Owens, Wesley Joseph, Lynks, Yard Act and Mandy, Indiana

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth is appalled when she spots a strange man wrapped in only a towel exiting Elizabeths house next door. Convinced that it is her moral duty to save her friend from this scandal, Hyacinth begins to plot ways of flushing the man out

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.sub-title: Does Your Mother Know Youre Out
programme.desc: Mother wants Timothy to paint the cupboard under the stairs before the man comes to read the meter. However, Timothy is more concerned with betting snide colleague Victor that he can take new library assistant Caroline for a cinema trip to see Gone With the Wind

programme.title: Top of the Pops

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the wildlife of Europe, a crowded continent hiding the most surprising animals in pockets of wilderness. Gibraltar Nature Reserve is home to Europes only wild population of primates, with its Barbary macaques living a life of kidnapping and high drama, while in the cemeteries of Vienna graverobbing European hamsters do battle with one another. Italian mountain villages are the hunting grounds for rarely seen wolves, and lynx lurk in the forests of Spain

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1977 edition of the old-time music hall programme, with Val Doonican, Sheila Steafel, Rita Morris and Dailey and Wayne entertaining an audience from the stage of the Leeds City Varieties

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: A concerned mother hires Hetty to find out who is stalking her daughter just days before her wedding. Its not long before the unlikely sleuth is on the trail of a disgraced soldier with a grudge against the father of the bride-to-be. Light-hearted drama, starring Patricia Routledge and Derek Benfield

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: Romero tells Claire and Jon that Adama had been interviewing migrants for his thesis, and ONeill is wounded while searching for the envelope. Immigration hostel manager Tomas Torres grows anxious after a police visit, and, identified using CCTV from Nicks office, an Irish ex-criminal living in Bilboa is interviewed by Claire. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: Bruno is caught by police at Sanihaz, the medical waste facility Olatz had visited. He claims his cousin Tomas was responsible for the people-smuggling and murders. However, footage of ONeill and images of Tomas prove Bruno is lying about the killers identity. The smuggling profits fail to explain Nicks involvement. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Parkinson
programme.desc: Highlights of Michael Parkinsons interviews with leading actresses Bette Midler, Lauren Bacall, Ingrid Bergman, Bette Davis, Raquel Welch, Shirley MacLaine, Gloria Swanson and Miss Piggy

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: The natural world at rest offers a constant source of calm and comfort, helping people to experience more being and less doing. Mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe talks viewers through the process and onto an immersive journey around the sights and sounds of resting wildlife all over the planet

programme.title: Secret Knowledge
programme.desc: The presenter tells the story of the 17th-century residence in Derbyshire - the pleasure palace of playboy Cavalier and ambitious courtier William Cavendish. Through a collection of artworks and items held within the castle, Lucy uncovers a colourful tale, capturing the tensions of England in the 1600s that would eventually lead the nation to civil war

Light-hearted drama, starring Patricia Routledge and Derek Benfield

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Kate Humble shares prey-eye view footage featuring a pride of lions. Hamza Yassin attempts to befriend a kangaroo, known as Brave, who is notoriously nervous around men

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Fly-Tippers Get Caught in the Act
programme.desc: In Warwickshire, farmers take a stand against fly-tippers who have been blighting their land with van loads of dumped waste. In Northern Irelands Mourne Mountains, fast moving wildfires threaten grazing land and livestock, as exhausted firefighters and farmers join forces to bring the flames under control. In north Wales, reporter Paul Colgan meets Rhianon Bragg, a courageous survivor of domestic abuse whose terrifying ordeal on her rural smallholding exposed the hidden dangers faced by victims living in isolation

programme.title: Crimewatch Caught
programme.desc: The story of a van driver who called 999 after making a horrific discovery, leaving police to determine if he was telling the truth or covering a crime. Plus, the hunt to catch a right-wing extremist

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Jacqui and Frankie from The Traitors
programme.desc: Jacqui Joseph recruits The Traitors star Frankie Rowan-Plowden to oversee the auction of a property in Kent and theres a cottage in Cornwall that has taken quirky to a new level. Martin Roberts is in Bristol to see a mid-terraced house

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion presents from Shepton Mallet, Somerset. Mother-and-daughter duo Bernie and Emma search for bargains with the help of Raj Bisram but find themselves reluctant to part with cash at first. On the blue team, friends Amy and Caroline are on the hunt for pottery with the help of Thomas Forrester

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Elaine and Paul in Mickleover, Derbyshire, love all things 1950s - be they cars, clothes or music. Elaine also loves fairies. On a budget of £3,000, Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull create a garden inspired by the rock and roll era that will also make the couples fairy-tale dreams come true

programme.title: Celebrity Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ian H Watkins, along with his partner Tom, put property expert Denise Nurse through her paces as she attempts to find their perfect family home in the south Wales countryside where the Steps singer was born and raised. Away from the search, they all try their hands at sheep herding and visit a Welsh tea plantation

programme.title: The Sound of Music (1965)
programme.desc: A cheerful novice nun is employed as governess to the seven children of an austere widower. As she brings light, laughter and a love of all things harmonious to a family previously beset by grief and strict discipline she also falls in love with her employer. But before long, the looming threat of the Second World War jeopardises their happy household. Oscar-winning Rodgers and Hammerstein musical, starring Julie Andrews, Christopher Plummer and Eleanor Parker

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which four pairs of contestants have to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Gethin Jones

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The Marvellous Miniature Workshop
programme.desc: Abi Trotman recreates a miniature version of a 1980s east London school classroom for restaurateur Kim, capturing memories of a beloved teacher and the first real sense of safety and belonging. Presented by Sara Cox

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: JB Gill and Angellica Bell present the topical magazine-style programme that showcases stories of all varieties from all over the UK, ranging from the comic to the tragic, as well as interviews with guest stars

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.sub-title: Iron Gran: Im in My 80s and Doing Triathalons
programme.desc: The comedian invites artist Caroline Pool to paint Eddie - aka Iron Gran - an inspiring 82-year-old who has completed eight Ironman triathlons. After losing her husband in her 50s, Eddie started running long distance to help her cope. At 60 she learned how to swim and at 72, she became the oldest British woman to ever complete an Ironman triathalon, 10-years later she shows no signs of slowing down. Caroline faces the dilemma, should she capture Eddies fun-loving energy or reveal something quieter and more reflective beneath the surface?

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: A couple are targeted by a burglar who repeatedly sneaks back in to clean up without a trace. With several potential suspects, Humphrey must uncover who is out for revenge. Kelby tries to help a young teen held captive in a garden shed and Ester wrestles with a tension headache. Despite putting fostering on pause, Humphrey and Martha find the decision at the forefront of their minds

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Roy Wood Jr chairs the satirical current affairs quiz, with Armando Iannucci and Anushka Asthana joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the recent headlines

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Alex Murphy. Conor and Jock finally reunite after Jock makes a lucky escape from the Colombian prison and becomes a stowaway on a ship bound for Cork

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor James McAvoy, who talks about his directorial debut, The Morning Show star Gugu Mbatha-Raw, discussing her crime thriller Fuze, actress, singer and producer Rita Wilson, chatting about her sixth studio album, and comedian Russell Howard, whos promoting his stand-up tour Dont Tell the Algorithm

programme.title: Wedding Crashers (2005)
programme.desc: Two party-mad bachelors make the most of the romantic atmosphere as they gatecrash weddings to pick up women. With a catalogue of tall stories to tell guests, the pair are regularly the hit of the events they attend - until one of them falls for a bridesmaid and they both learn a few things about love. Comedy, starring Owen Wilson, Vince Vaughn, Christopher Walken, Jane Seymour, Rachel McAdams and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Woodworker Bruce comes up with a plan to create luxurious loungers from Jacqui Josephs skip-bound garden furniture and some wood

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish (2022)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling cat joins forces with pickpocket Kitty Softpaws and lovable stray dog Perrito to journey deep into the Dark Forest. They attempt to locate the fabled Wishing Star, which can restore his spent lives. Animated comedy, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: Fifty years on, David Attenborough returns to Madagascar to see how the island has changed since his first visit, and to search for more clues about one of his most treasured possessions, the egg of an elephant bird, an ostrich-like creature that weighed half a ton. Scientists perform tests to determine the age of the egg, as the naturalist discovers whether the birds extinction can shed light on what is happening on the island today

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Port Vale (Kick-off 5.15pm). All the action from the quarter-final at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea are yet to play a Premier League team in this seasons competition and after making short work of Charlton Athletic and Hull City, they were taken to extra time by Wrexham before eventually prevailing 4-2. Vale have struggled in League One this term, but this is their first appearance in this stage of the cup since they reached the semi-finals in the 1953/54 season, and they have already taken the scalp of one top-flight side, beating Sunderland 1-0 at home in the previous round

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Southampton v Arsenal (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the quarter-final at St Marys Stadium. The Saints have already taken one Premier League scalp in Fulham in the previous round and will now look to cause an even bigger upset against the Gunners. While Arsenal were beaten by Manchester City in the League Cup final, they are still chasing glory in this competition, the Premier League and the UEFA Champions League, but were made to work harder than may have been expected in a 2-1 win at Mansfield Town in round five

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy make plans to vacate their suburban empty nest property. The pair view a property that Lucy loves when, embarrassingly, Lee needs the toilet. Before he can use it however, a second buyer turns up to take a look at the property. To dissuade him from putting in an offer, Lee pretends to be the vendor. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: The Outfit (2022)
programme.desc: Leonard, a master English tailor who has ended up in Chicago, operates a corner tailor shop with his assistant, where he makes beautiful clothes for the only people around who can afford them - a family of vicious gangsters. One night, two killers knock on his door in need of a favour - And Leonard is thrust into a deadly game of deception and murder. Crime drama, starring Mark Rylance, Zoey Deutch and Johnny Flynn

programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor James McAvoy, who talks about his directorial debut, The Morning Show star Gugu Mbatha-Raw, discussing her crime thriller Fuze, actress, singer and producer Rita Wilson, chatting about her sixth studio album, and comedian Russell Howard, whos promoting his stand-up tour Dont Tell the Algorithm

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test-drive an Aston Martin DBS Convertible, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Convertible through Romania, searching for the mountain highway built during the reign of the countrys former dictator Nicolae Ceausescu - allegedly the best road to drive on in the world. Actor Eric Bana is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Jock and Siobháns daughter Star is turning six and a birthday party is being organised. Orla Walsh however is having her kitchen redone, and asks Mairead to host the party. Coming-of-age comedy drama, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Six-year-old Star accidentally discovers the Billy Murphy mask, infuriating Sergeant Healy. Conor and Jocks genius plan to help Jock and Star have a video call is rumbled by Linda. Coming-of-age comedy drama, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Murdered by My Boyfriend
programme.desc: Drama about a teenage girls romance with an older man who, although handsome and initially charming, soon begins to dominate every aspect of her life as his jealous and possessive nature gets out of control. Starring Georgina Campbell and Royce Pierreson

programme.title: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: Six teenagers learn where their clothes have come from, travelling to India to see first-hand the textiles industry that churns out designer-wear for Western consumers like themselves. As the group experience life in these workshops, the stress of life where employees literally eat and sleep by their machines becomes too much for one - and that is before they learn about their wages

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall sets out to visit six continents in search of Earths 60 deadliest animals, with Ethiopia this weeks port of call

programme.title: The Mask (1994)
programme.desc: A timid bank clerk stumbles on an ancient mask, which endows whoever wears it with untold superhuman powers, unbridled self-confidence and an irresistible charm for the ladies. Unfortunately, he earns the enmity of a local gangster for daring to flirt with his girlfriend - and when the crook gets wind of the artefacts existence, he covets the power for himself. Fantasy comedy, with Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz, Peter Riegert and Peter Greene

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean-set crime drama returns, and there is a double celebration as the show marks its landmark 100th episode and Commissioner Selwyn Patterson celebrates 50 years of service. However, the party is cut short when the boss is shot by a mysterious assassin and left fighting for his life. As the team members search for the culprit, will the police veteran survive? Starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Shantol Jackson

programme.title: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: The six youngsters experience the physical challenge of the cotton harvest, where they are shocked by the laborious process and the appalling standard of the living conditions, with the daily wage being just £1.20. Though they are in a dingy hovel with no amenities, for Georgina the most horrifying fact is that her Indian co-workers shop for clothes twice a year at most

programme.title: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: The teenagers experience life in the Mumbai city slums as they are set to work in segregated sweatshops barely a stones throw from the enticing glamour of Bollywood. One saving grace is that unlike the locals, they do not have to sleep at their sewing machines, but with children below the legal minimum working age with them, they finally agree that something has to be done

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet announces she is pregnant, much to Jonnys delight. Gaz leaps into action to foil Louises blackmail scheme, and Donna discovers selling the house is going to make her rich. Ralf Little and Sheridan Smith star

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny decides to prove his responsibility by learning to drive, but his efforts come to an abrupt halt when Louise holds his car hostage. Donna splits from Gaz and resolves to take revenge on Janet - but eventually decides to leave the country instead

programme.title: Murdered by My Father
programme.desc: A widowed father attempts to ensure his daughter is set up with the right husband. However, as her planned engagement approaches, she falls for a charismatic charmer and becomes caught in a conflict between two generations with differing values. Fact-based drama, starring Adeel Akhtar and Kiran Sonia Sawar

programme.title: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: The six teenagers learn, live and work in a backstreet sweatshop as they are given three days to produce 36 blouses between them among locals who each have to stitch 20 a day for just 25p a garment. The areas poverty leaves Richard struggling to cope, but that is nothing compared to the physical challenge of their next destination - Indias cotton fields

programme.title: Trolls World Tour (2020)
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover there are different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash decide to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct. Animated adventure, with the voices of Anna Kendrick, Justin Timberlake and Rachel Bloom

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The people of a Victorian Yorkshire mill town are terrified when bodies start washing up from the river, their skin bright red and waxy. but with the Doctor and Clara nowhere to be seen, its up to Silurian detective Madame Vastra and her sidekicks Jenny and Strax to get to the bottom of the mystery. Diana Rigg and her real-life daughter Rachael Stirling guest star, with Catrin Stewart, Neve McIntosh and Dan Starkey as the Time Lords Earth-bound investigative pals

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, his wife is preoccupied with plotting revenge on the ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice? Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: In a bid to make some much-needed money, Alison and Mike consider selling some land. The plan proves far from straight forward however, with Lady Button up in arms at the mere thought of losing some of her beloved estate. Thomas enters a competition that he hopes will finally see him become a published poet, but hearing Lady Button speak so passionately about Button House gives him an idea or two. Pat and Julian get locked in a dispute and it is Robin who offers a surprising pearl of wisdom. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Lotto fever hits Foleys bar and it doesnt take long before rumours swirl around Finglas that Agnes is the jackpot winner. Meanwhile, a DNA test and the surprise return visit of Cathys childhood friend leaves Agnes with some serious questions to answer about her past. Comedy, guest starring Debra Stephenson, with Brendan OCarroll, Danny OCarroll, Paddy Houlihan and Eilish OCarroll

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Dermot and Maria decide to renew their wedding vows, forcing Agnes to organise the ceremony alongside archnemesis Hillary. Meanwhile, Fathers Damien and Trevors mountain pilgrimage goes wrong, raising the possibility they might fail to make it back in time to officiate the ceremony. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll, Susie Blake, Paddy Houlihan and Fiona OCarroll

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny recovers from his recent brush with death, enjoying 15 minutes of fame and organising a Press conference at which he plans to take his first step from the wheelchair. Donna and Gazs relationship begins to look shaky, while Louise confesses to the shooting since she cannot bear the thought of someone else taking the credit

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donna inherits a house, but receives a strange warning never to open the cupboard under the stairs. Louise confides in a police psychotherapist and Jonny feels too scared to go outside after the shooting - so Janet resorts to starving him out

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mobeen Azhars investigation into prison corruption uncovers the murder of a former officer who had been involved in exposing an illicit relationship. When news breaks of a prison governor being jailed for a relationship with a drug-dealing gang boss, Mobeen becomes determined to uncover the true extent of criminal influence inside our prisons

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny offers to provide some under-age kids with alcohol, but having been banned from the off-licence, it falls to Louise to provide the goods. When she returns empty-handed, all hell breaks loose. Donna decides she needs to find new friends, while Gaz goes in search of casual sex

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: The conflicts between the group conspire to ruin Janet and Jonnys hen and stag parties. The plan for a quiet baby shower rather than a raucous girls night out goes awry, as Donna refuses to come and Louise is desperate to let her hair down before she gets sent to jail

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May are challenged to create a TV advert for Volkswagen, but soon fall out as James concentrates on detailed information on fuel economy and Jeremy wants something more exciting. Richard Hammond explores an alternative to Germanic sports saloons and tests the Vauxhall VXR8 Bathurst, and former US chat show host Jay Leno is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Press X to Continue
programme.sub-title: What Do NFTs and the Blockchain Mean for Gaming?
programme.desc: BBC gaming reporter Steffan Powell chats about forgotten titles, contemplating what NFTs and the blockchain mean for gaming

programme.title: Panorama
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Dogs: Is The Ban Working? - Panorama
programme.desc: Two years ago, the Government banned XL Bully dogs, promising it would save lives. Reporter Sam Poling investigates whether that promise has been kept. Attacks are still happening, the police say the law is difficult to enforce, and some animal charities say they are overwhelmed with abandoned dogs. Sam hears from families whove lost loved ones and owners struggling to stay on the right side of the law

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary prepares for her official debut in London society, buoyed by her friendship with Ann and the attentions of Mr Ryder. But a run-in with her old rival Caroline Bingley threatens her growing confidence. Mary faces up to her old rival at a dinner party, while an urgent message from home throws everything into uncertainty

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary rushes to Pemberley, fearing her mother is gravely ill, only to be thrown back into the demands of family life. She begins to lose hope of ever returning to London, until Mr Ryder unexpectedly turns up. His clear admiration for Mary helps the family to recognise how much she has changed. As excitement mounts over Mr Ryders visit, Mary finds herself on the brink of a momentous decision

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie heads to Kent, where he meets soon-to-be-grandmother Tracey and suggests to her that borrowing a pet might lower her blood pressure. He explains how spending time with animals has been proven to boost happiness, improve wellbeing and lower the risk of dying from cardiovascular disease

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Martel and Nitro from Gladiators
programme.desc: Martel and Nitro from Gladiators duel with each other over ideas at a studio flat in London, and theres a look back into the archives, all the way back to 2009, when Martin Roberts was charmed by a Grade II listed house in Devon

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Sonnaz Nooranvary and Angelina Bakalarou work together to repair a lamp left to visitor John by his friend Brian who passed away during the Aids epidemic. He has fond memories of the lamp decorating Brians flat during his lavish cocktail parties in the 1980s and is hoping the experts can bring it back to its former glory. Chris from Surrey brings in his father Chriss shoes used when he was a training partner to Roger Bannister when he broke the four-minute mile. Sisters Sara and Simone bring in a brooch left to them by their step-grandmother Jean who died in a plane crash in 1973 for Richard Talman to take a look at. Mark Stuckey is tasked with repairing a reel-to-reel audio recorder that holds performances by visitor Michaels father from before he died

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: An appeal for funds on behalf of a registered charity

programme.title: King of Kings (1961)
programme.desc: Biblical epic chronicling the life of Christ, from the rumours of a coming Messiah before his birth, through his rise as a spiritual leader to his eventual betrayal, crucifixion and resurrection. Narrated by Orson Welles and starring Jeffrey Hunter, Siobhan McKenna, Robert Ryan, Rip Torn, Hurd Hatfield and Harry Guardino

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: Mark Horton visits Liverpool to view Brunels famous ship, the Great Eastern, which now lies beneath the mud. Mark recounts the story of her greatest triumph - how she conquered the Atlantic by connecting Britains edge to America with 2,000 miles of telegraph wire

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin (1966)
programme.desc: Former crook and disreputable spy Harry Palmer has to carefully engineer the defection of a Russian officer responsible for safeguarding vital military secrets - but the mission proves less than straightforward. Cold War thriller and the second film to feature Len Deightons character, starring Michael Caine, Eva Renzi, Oscar Homolka, Paul Hubschmid and Guy Doleman

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents the show from Eston in Cleveland. Among the treasures unearthed are a cubist elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, used to promote floor covering, a Victorian painting bought for five shillings and the first commercially produced toy robot, made in the 1930s

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The experts value objects brought into Blackburn Cathedral, where Charles Hanson assessing a wooden Fijian club, while two vintage enamel signs catch Philip Serrells eye. Presenter Paul Martin takes a look at the impressive Talbot collection - local press photographs taken of events, celebrities and the royal family over a 50-year period

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Ahir Shah, Michaela Strachan, Dr Xand van Tulleken and Vogue Williams test their general knowledge skills in the final round of challenges on double points Friday

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: The team returns to offer more horticultural tips and advice, with Carole Baxter and Brian Cunningham kicking off the season with a range of jobs that can be done now. Carole also planting up an Easter container that will bring colour and joy to any garden, while Brian starts some much needed maintenance-pruning on the stem bank border. Plus, a trip to Edinburgh to catch up with what George Anderson is doing in his own garden in Joppa

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Northern Ireland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again, and only one can go through to the final. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges - Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros DSa, whose films Ordinary Love and Good Vibrations have already been celebrated in dishes earlier in the week

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: With a long Easter weekend to look forward to, Monty Don is on hand with practical gardening advice and inspiration, including how to get potatoes in the ground if you fancy growing them. Hell also be sowing seeds for a colourful cut flower display, and starting a new project to show how easy and inexpensive it is to create topiary from yew cuttings. Ashley Edwards heads to a magical spring garden in Horsham to share his love of the season of renewal while, in Carmarthenshire, theres a grower who gave up her job in London to follow her dream of becoming a flower farmer

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Change sweeps across Xudum, and every big cat character must adapt to survive. The core of the Xudum lion pride has moved south, but a group of its young, opportunistic females has remained in the north. The crew is excited to find one of these lionesses has cubs, but as a first-time mum, she has a lot to learn. Cheetah mum Pobe experiences tragedy when a leopard attacks, but hope returns when her three-year-old daughter Neelo is found, and shes thriving, while Lediba the leopard reveals there is more to her than meets the eye, but shes under increasing pressure to catch large prey

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street (2013)
programme.desc: A New York stockbroker rises from unemployment to become one of the richest men in the citys financial elite through an illegal scheme to defraud investors. His wealth brings him an outrageously debauched lifestyle, but comes at a price as the FBI become suspicious of his manipulation of the markets. Martin Scorseses fact-based drama, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Jonah Hill and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: The Beasts (2022)
programme.desc: Middle-aged French couple Antoine and Olga have moved to an inland Galician hamlet, happy to live off the land and renovate some dilapidated properties and intending to settle down. However, their presence inflames two locals to the point of shocking violence. Thriller, starring Marina Foïs, Denis Menochet and Luis Zahera. In French and Spanish

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Northern Ireland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again, and only one can go through to the final. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges - Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros DSa, whose films Ordinary Love and Good Vibrations have already been celebrated in dishes earlier in the week

The core of the Xudum lion pride has moved south, but a group of its young, opportunistic females has remained in the north. The crew is excited to find one of these lionesses has cubs, but as a first-time mum, she has a lot to learn. Cheetah mum Pobe experiences tragedy when a leopard attacks, but hope returns when her three-year-old daughter Neelo is found, and shes thriving, while Lediba the leopard reveals there is more to her than meets the eye, but shes under increasing pressure to catch large prey

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Investigations from BBC correspondents all over the world, revealing secrets, rooting out injustice and exposing crime, corruption and abuse

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Stories start appearing in the newspaper about the Piris, who end up arguing with each other and quickly agree that they need to find the secret gossiper

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima wants to tell Big Lizard all about her life on Earth, no matter what the cost

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The eagles teach the ducklings how to fly in formation

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Herbert is starting to feel his age and secretly drinks from the Fountain of Youth, but his desire to be young puts the whole quest in jeopardy

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings set up a mini fair, but Grizzy steals the Lemmings tickets

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck has to deliver pizzas around the town, but he hasnt reckoned with the lengths to which Frog will go to get them all for himself

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: Pro gamer Jelly guides the teams in an exhilarating WRC race. Who will cross the finish line first in this nail-biting battle?

programme.title: Bros in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe deliver Callum his dinner in style via hovercraft and off-road driving

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.sub-title: Fire, Nitro, Diamond, Cyclone v the Restaurant!
programme.desc: Nitro, Cyclone, Legend and Sabre dare each other to do silly things at a restaurant and obey rivals outrageous instructions for the chance to win or tap out and risk losing

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall heads to Slovenia in search of the nose-horned viper and also hopes to track down a bear and goes deep into a cave system to find a dragon

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: With a long Easter weekend to look forward to, Monty Don is on hand with practical gardening advice and inspiration, including how to get potatoes in the ground if you fancy growing them. Hell also be sowing seeds for a colourful cut flower display, and starting a new project to show how easy and inexpensive it is to create topiary from yew cuttings. Ashley Edwards heads to a magical spring garden in Horsham to share his love of the season of renewal while, in Carmarthenshire, theres a grower who gave up her job in London to follow her dream of becoming a flower farmer

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told (1965)
programme.desc: The life of Jesus, from His lowly birth in Bethlehem and the miracles He performed, to His ultimate betrayal at the hands of disciple Judas Iscariot and His death by crucifixion. Biblical drama, starring Max von Sydow, David McCallum, Telly Savalas, Charlton Heston, Angela Lansbury and Sidney Poitier, plus several cameos including John Wayne

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for Northern Ireland with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. The judges are 2025s banquet winners Sally Abe and Jean Delport. Dishes include a red knotted brioche handkerchief as a homage to School for Good and Evil. Also, theres a tribute to director Lisa Barros DSa with barbecued monkfish served from a teapot

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three talented chefs from Northern Ireland are halfway through their heat, and the pressure is mounting. Once again, they each serve a unique take on the brief celebrating the British film industry and films with links to Northern Ireland. The dishes are judged by veteran judges Jean Delport and Sally Abe, and include a roast chicken inspired by Kenneth Branaghs adaptation of Murder on the Orient Express, as well two desserts inspired by the film Good Vibrations

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman goes property shopping with a couple who, after exploring the UK in their camper van for the last two years, have decided to settle down in the Cairngorms

programme.title: Earths Great Rivers
programme.desc: Following the astonishing wildlife, landscapes and people of the worlds longest river, the Nile, beginning in the tropical mountain range of the Rwenzoris, home to one of the worlds strangest birds, the shoebill stork. Then, cameras follow the Niles journey as it travels through the wild Savannah lands of Uganda, before reaching the Ethiopian highlands where it receives an injection of water far to the East

programme.title: Death on the Nile (1978)
programme.desc: Detective Hercule Poirot investigates a murder on board a paddle steamer in Egypt. The victim was an unpopular heiress, whose outspoken manner put her at odds with most of her fellow passengers during their cruise on the Nile. Agatha Christie mystery, starring Peter Ustinov, Bette Davis, Maggie Smith, George Kennedy, Mia Farrow, Jane Birkin, Olivia Hussey, Angela Lansbury and David Niven

programme.title: Inside Britains National Parks
programme.desc: Pembrokeshire Coast National Park offers breathtaking views of rugged shorelines, sandy beaches, and offshore islands. It is home to numerous seabird colonies, including guillemots and the endangered puffin, and its many bays provide a haven for grey seals and their pups. Beyond the coast, a diverse landscape of marshes, with salt and freshwater meadows support a variety of rare mammals and birds

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Lauren Price v Stephanie Piñeiro. Coverage of the bout for the WBA, IBO, IBF and WBC Welterweight titles at Utilita Arena Cardiff. Price holds all four belts following her comfortable points victory over Natasha Jonas in her last contest 13 months ago and she is undefeated in her nine professional fights. Piñeiro also boasts an unblemished record from her 10 bouts in the pro ranks, but this is her first fight match outside her native Puerto Rico

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: A musical compilation, featuring Tina Turner and Phil Collins, Soul II Soul, Paula Abdul, Lisa Stansfield and the Beautiful South. Madchester favourites Stone Roses and Happy Mondays put in an appearance, along with Stock Aitken Waterman stalwarts Kylie Minogue, Jason Donovan and Sonia. Plus, Sydney Youngblood, Mike and the Mechanics, Rebel MC and Double Trouble, along with duets from Marc Almond and Gene Pitney, and Linda Ronstadt and Aaron Neville

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Musical recap of a new decade and a new era as hip-hop, dance and indie flavours began to find a place in the mainstream charts. Top of the Pops continued to cater the best performances every Thursday to the British public with lots of dry ice, handheld cameras and a small but noisy studio audience. This compilation celebrates with some of the best studio performances of the biggest hits including break-out appearances by Adamski featuring Seal, Vanilla Ice, Beats International, EMF, the KLF Primal Scream and Snap! Plus, plenty of girl power from Betty Boo, Sinead OConnor, Maria McKee, En Vogue, Kylie Minogue and Tina Turner

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey is under pressure to charge James Whitlock. Her failure to reach Napier leads to her facing the consequences of her actions, but an unlikely group of allies presents itself. Pierson must convince his colleagues that he is fit for the job, and an off-the-record military group seek advice from the mysterious Simon on how to get their plans back on track

programme.title: Clash of the Superpowers: America vs China
programme.desc: Part two of two. Xi Jinpings government have high hopes for Joe Biden, Donald Trumps successor as US president, but these are dashed after a frosty meeting in Alaska. Biden sparks further anger in Beijing when he signs a nuclear submarine deal with Australia and the UK, and takes on China over tech, before Nancy Pelosis visit to Taiwan brings the two superpowers closer than ever to military confrontation

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
programme.desc: A home reportedly becomes haunted when two sisters open a mysterious box. Plus, a young girl believes she is being stalked by a malicious entity

programme.title: In Search of Aliens
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos from Ancient Aliens investigates whether extra-terrestrial beings lie at the heart of some of Earths most famous mysteries. Alongside experts, he explores the puzzling construction of Puma Punku in Bolivia, contemplating whether advanced technology could have been used to carve the ancient temple complex

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: For thousands of years, people have held the belief that everyday objects can possess hidden energy. Talismans are seen as providing protection, good fortune and some are even thought to embody a higher power. Could it be that what fuels our faith in talismans is not superstition, but a real connection to something beyond our world?

programme.title: Roswell 75: The Final Evidence
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary revisitingthe alleged crash of an extra terrestrial craft at Roswell, New Mexico in July 1947. Renowned scientist Dr David Hall returns with ufologist and author Anna Whitty, world leading UFO expert Philip Mantle and stage magician Spyros Melaris dig deep into the stories that surround the strangest of occurences

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: When Les takes his niece Karen under his wing to help out at the jewellery counter, Ashley fails to conceal her jealousy well

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Seth thinks Les is stuck in the past for hand-delivering their gold to a refinery, and bets his father that his new mail order service will improve things

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Tensions between Karen and Ashley explode on the sales floor, so Les puts them both in the doghouse. Documentary series following the daily running of a pawn shop

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and the team value antiques in Burton-upon-Trent, Staffordshire, including a Victorian amber bracelet, a Moorcroft vase and a blunderbuss. Plus, a bronze pheasant causes excitement when it lands on dealer Tim Hogarths table

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: Members of the public bring in their antiques to be valued by a team of experts including Debbie Serpell and Karen Dalmeny, and some Royal Doulton figurines are among the items presented for inspection. Hosted by David Dickinson, with Stewart Hofgartner and David Tupman

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick rocks out when a seller brings in a blazer worn by the Rolling Stones Keith Richards. Chum brings out his inner warrior when a Japanese Samurai mask hits the counter. Meanwhile, Corey tries to paint a picture-perfect deal when a Norman Rockwell autograph comes into the shop

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly: Henrys Wreck-trospective
programme.desc: Compilation of episodes from the show Junk and Disorderly, which features Henry Cole and other restorers buying, fixing, and selling automotive junk

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: UFO Over the Andes, the Ohio Grassman and Ancient Horn Mystery
programme.desc: The legendary Ohio Grassman is apparently captured in footage of a tall, dark-coloured, hairy creature walking through woods. Plus, a look at the Chilean family photograph of a real UFO flying above the Andes Mountains and the notion that a 5,000-year-old horn discovered on a beach in England belongs to a prehistoric creature that still lives

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Men in Black Calls, Old Kentucky Aliens and Mysterious Eclipse
programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team of experts examine several seemingly impossible events, such as a family managing to survive a bolt of lightning ripping through their car during a Kansas storm, a bizarre creature spotted on a driveway camera and an image captured of an alien probe

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Bird Monster, Ancient Alien Satellite and Behemoth of the Sea Bottom
programme.desc: A strange creature captured by a security camera in Youngstown, Ohio. The bizarre footage leaves residents and experts scratching their heads as they try to identify the mysterious beast. Plus, a strange, deafening sound that echoed across the entire Equatorial Pacific Ocean

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Teen UFO, Flying Dinosaur Over Idaho, and Headless Goats
programme.desc: A photograph taken by a Swedish teenager said to offer some of the most convincing UFO evidence ever. Plus, a video posted online showing a pterodactyl-like creature flying over Idaho and the reason headless goats are repeatedly being dumped in an Atlanta River

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Swamp Beast Sighting, Martian Conspiracy and Transparent Mexican Sea Monster
programme.desc: An investigation into a remarkable sighting of the skunk ape, a creature often likened to Bigfoot. A canoer claims to have captured footage of this elusive beast navigating through gator-infested waters, raising questions about what may be lurking in the swamps. Plus, the discovery of a peculiar transparent sea monster off the coast of Mexico, which has sparked the curiosity of marine enthusiasts and experts alike

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: The Hollywood actor considers buildings of Biblical proportions. From a grand basilica in Vatican City and the towering monuments of Ancient Egypt to a Biblical tower and a lost city in the clouds of Peru, he uncovers their construction, purpose and the enduring mysteries they hold

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the legendary locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. The Hollywood actor explores the stories behind these lost sacred sites and the incredible endeavours to find them

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Devils Bible
programme.desc: The Codex Gigas, also known as the Devils Bible, is a giant medieval tome that has evoked fear for centuries and believed to contain a malevolent power. Experts investigate its legendary secrets and uncover the mystery behind its author Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Quest to Find the Tomb of Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: The fate of Mary Magdalene after the resurrection of Jesus is one of the worlds greatest mysteries. The ancient site of Gobekli Tepe is the oldest building complex ever discovered, yet continues to baffle archaeologists. Now, experts investigate new theories behind its enigmatic construction as a possible commemoration to a cataclysmic event. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Mysteries of the Worlds Oldest Temple
programme.desc: A subterranean Neolithic temple discovered on the island of Malta contains the skeletal remains of thousands of humans. Experts use forensic archaeology to investigate elongated skulls that may unlock the secrets of an advanced, lost civilisation. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
