programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, an incident causes Jamaican-born security guard Weston to reveal the challenges of working on the hospital frontline, where incidents of aggression, violence and harassment are on the rise. Plus, the mother of a seven-year-old patient talks about the patience it takes to care for a neurodiverse child

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Seven players remain, all vying to win up to £100,000. But with five Predators and only two Prey, the competition must undergo a reset. As the rules of the game take a radical new direction, theres a brutal surprise for one player and a dramatic reversal of fortune for another. But its an agonising, heart-breaking decision forced onto one Prey that provides the biggest upset of the game so far

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Cardiff and Newport compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. Outspoken sisters Sue and Joyce do not enjoy the Asian-themed sushi offerings from Rachel and Mark, while discerning snail-breeding French foodie Philippe and his British wife Trish prove tough to impress

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Biggest Builds and Complete Overhauls
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two of their biggest builds. In Huddersfield, Paul and Dawn Welham-Campbells higgledy-piggledy layout simply does not work for them any more. Kirstie gets the sledgehammer out, while Phil searches for properties to rival Paul and Dawns own. In Woodford, east London, Keeley and Terrence Stamp are also at loggerheads. Keeleys fed up that their family of five is bursting out of their three bedrooms and one bathroom, and that their open plan lounge is basically one big noisy thoroughfare. Which of the property duo will come up with the best solution to their problems?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers Coach is being taken for a ride by a so-called friend, so he and the regulars plot to beat the con-artist at his own game. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane learsn that if she is not married within 24 hours, her mother with lose her inheritance from her late husbands estate. In light of such developments, Diane asks Sam to marry her on a strict business basis. Shelley Long stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Sam reacts to Dianes attraction to his brother by inviting her to go to Paris with him

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boys father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is forced to pretend he is Mels husband at a party, and Frasier hires a butler who spoils everyone in the household. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio shrink begins to date the attractive attorney whos defending him against Donny - who was jilted at the altar by Daphne - although he suspects that she is unfairly running up his bill

programme.title: Tooth Fairy (2010)
programme.desc: A minor-league ice hockey player is nicknamed the Tooth Fairy for knocking opponents teeth out on the ice. When the cynical athlete discourages a young fan, he is forced to pay penance by spending a week as the real Tooth Fairy, rediscovering his dreams in the process. Family comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Ashley Judd, Stephen Merchant, Ryan Sheckler and Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Stormbreaker (2006)
programme.desc: Teenager Alex Rider discovers his late uncle was a secret agent, and is assigned the task of completing his last mission - uncovering a criminal masterminds plan to cause mayhem with a new kind of super-computer. Adventure based on Anthony Horowitzs novel, starring Alex Pettyfer, Bill Nighy, Mickey Rourke, Alicia Silverstone and Stephen Fry

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi meets Jaazzmina and Mark, who want to move to Spain to establish a smallholding and wellness retreat in the countryside of Almería Province. Theyre keen to be as remote as possible and connect with nature, and have a budget of £100,000 to invest. Sara sets out to find five suitable properties for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Portugal, a new bar seems set to be about to run out of beer and at a holiday let there are wild boar on the loose. In the French Pyrenees, cyclists on a guided tour ride through the snow to reach the top of a mountain, but end the day with a dip in the pool

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a feisty week in Kent - when some of the BandBers couldnt even wait until payment day to get their gripes off their chest - it is now actually payment day and theyve still saved their most incendiary comments for the main event

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Sheffield, property developer Ambrose serves up his favourite, tried-and-tested dishes. The evening starts with a bang when many of the guests mistake his no dress code to mean they can turn up naked. As soon as the meal starts the knives are out with Leon suggesting that Ambrose thinks hes got it in the bag already. He then gets a barrage of questions from Sally on every micro detail of the meal, but seems unphased by it all. The group feel like they see a new side to Ambrose when he tells them that he plays for an international gay rugby team, but his real passion is fostering children. The dessert doesnt turn out as well as hed hoped, and the questions keep coming but hes happy to admit that he came into the competition to win

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Jasmine and her father Peter continue working on the childrens bedrooms, while work is completed on the family bathroom. Just as everyone is hoping that Jon will be well enough to work on the build again, the hospital delivers bad news to him. Daughter Joys bedroom is completed, and she gets her first look at it

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of their most brilliant builds in an episode all about flipping existing space, as the duo look back at one family who needed to cleverly reconfigure their homes layout. Graham and Nardeth Farhall bought their four-bed detached home in Windsor over 10 years ago. While Graham still saw it as their dream home, Nardeth was tired of the cramped, dated layout and wanted to sell up. Kirstie was ready to prove that their four-bedder was worth loving for the long-term. But with extending not an option, she had to work her magic on the existing space. Did Graham and Nardeth decide to love it or list it?

programme.title: Inside Cadbury: Chocolate Secrets Unwrapped
programme.desc: Documentary examining the world of one of Britains biggest and best-loved chocolate makers. Behind closed doors at Cadburys Bournville plant, a team of scientists struggles to meet the biggest challenge the company has faced for a century - to dramatically cut sugar from its Dairy Milk recipe. Can the new bar match up to its beloved predecessor? Elsewhere in the factory, new flavours of chocolate are put into production, with wacky recipes invented by lucky members of the public

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Prey (2022)
programme.desc: In 1719 on the Northern Great Plains, Comanche tracker Naru undertakes a rite of passage to slay a ferocious predator. During a fierce tussle with a mountain lion, Naru glimpses strange lights in the treeline: a warning that a highly evolved, otherworldly creature with cloaking technology and explosive armaments is at large on the plains. Sci-fi thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Dakota Beavers. Directed by Dan Trachtenberg, who also helmed recent franchise offerings Predator: Killer of Killers, and Predator: Badlands

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Larks in Transit
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the 2020 Strictly champion in which he became the first British comedian to tread the boards of the Royal Opera House in Covent Garden, sharing tales from more than 20 years as a travelling performer. Topics include Google reviews of Poundland stores, a unique proposal for a Victorian-style Love Island and Old MacDonald sung in the style of Tom Waits. With a guest appearance by soprano Florence Hvorostovsky

programme.title: Crawlspace (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal murder from beneath the floorboards of a rural cabin, a plumber finds himself trapped in the crawl space of the property in which the murderers think a load of cash is stashed. Thriller, starring Henry Thomas, Bradley Stryker and C Ernst Harth

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners BandB owners hit back at the mens opinion of their establishments cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotels Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Celebrities Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton have just 30 minutes to complete their makes and impress Kirstie and experts Polly and Piyush. Here, the duo try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Spence introduces Doug to his new girlfriend, a professional chef - and Carrie is less than pleased when her husband becomes devoted to the culinary delights she produces. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Christen Nelson

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug plan a weekend visit to Atlantic City to celebrate the anniversary of their first date - but they are not the only ones making the trip. Before they know it, Dougs boss is along for the ride. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dozy Doug cheers up Deacon by taking him clubbing, and Carrie begins to feel threatened by a lookalike colleague. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Maries home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Paw Patrol: The Movie (2021)
programme.desc: When the crews biggest rival, Mayor Humdinger, becomes Mayor of nearby Adventure City and starts wreaking havoc, Ryder and the heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge head-on. While one of the pups must face his past in Adventure City, the team finds help from a new ally, the savvy dachshund Liberty. Animated adventure, starring Tyler Perry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Manor House Inn in Haltwhistle, Northumberland, run by Terry and Rachel. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of their room, revelling in the romance of the honeymoon suite. Over drinks, the BandBers size up the competition as they compare their hospitality experience, with one revealing that theyre a veteran of the industry. After a sound sleep for some, Dean wakes up with a headache thanks to a banging headboard, and things dont get any better for him at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Tom and Beckys Orchard Glamping in Lancashire hoping to prove their pristine pods are pitch perfect. Things are off to a good start but breakfast divides opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough with hosts Tony and Paula who humbly reveal themselves as King and Queen of the towns hospitality scene, but their crowns slip at breakfast when the guests are not amused

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where father-and-daughter team Dean and Abigail take great pride in their pub. The trip hits the skids when Terry and Rachel give their room a dusting down and Becky and Tom arent taken in by the view

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Theres a smorgasbord of slanderous sleep scores, brutal breakfast bombshells and even one couple declining the opportunity to face their competitors. Eventually, it is revealed who has won the competition

programme.title: The Boat Race
programme.desc: Clare Balding, Jamie Laing and Ade Adepitan present live coverage of the annual womens and mens rowing races between Oxford and Cambridge Universities on the River Thames. Cambridges recent dominance of the event continued last year, with them winning their sixth mens race out of the last seven and also claiming their eighth consecutive womens victory

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South East London and Devon Revisit
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Laurens dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, in the Tyneside seaside town of Whitley Bay. Sarah and Sean share a sprawling six-bedroom, three-storey Victorian semi-detached home with their five children. It may have plenty of sleeping space but the kitchens cramped, the gardens like a postage-stamp, and all seven of them share one bathroom. Sarah, whos deeply attached to their beachside lifestyle and her home-run re-usable cloth nappy business, insists that they stay, in the firm belief that knocking down walls will solve everything. But Seans done with the galley kitchen, lack of outside space, and constant chaos of seven people sharing one toilet! He dreads uncovering problems from a house that constantly fights back during renovations. Of course, Kirstie loves knocking down walls, and she has a £70,000 budget to modernise inside while also preserving the Victorian charm. But emergency maintenance soon stretches her funds to the limit. Meanwhile, Phil scours the market with his £650,000 budget, finding some stunning homes that tempt Sean. But Sarah digs in, which puts the final decision on a knifes edge. Will the family love their seaside semi, or list it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: The historic Settle to Carlisle line, travelling through some of Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cumbrias most stunning countryside and passing over the iconic Ribblehead Viaduct. The trains staff help out with a surprise wedding proposal and a 90th birthday celebration, while executive chef Nick creates masterpiece meals including a shin of Galloway beef and a trio of mini desserts

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of locals living along Yorkshires coastline. This episode features members of the Robson family from Bridlington, whove been fishing the North Sea for generations, as they head up the coast to Whitby for a boat repair. Volunteers at Bempton Cliffs work to protect and preserve almost half a million seabirds, and a group of sea swimmers take a full-moon sea swim at Scarborough

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill uncovers the importance of ancient stories in Vietnamese culture. Setting sail on a traditional junk boat, he weaves through the breathtakingly beautiful limestone karsts and mythical waters of Ha Long Bay, where legends of dragons live on. From floating villages to freshly caught mussels, and flesh-eating fish, Bill finds himself at the end of his adventure

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Thoughtifier
programme.desc: The comedian goes on a magical, musical mystery tour of the human mind in his 2025 stand-up show recorded live at the Edinburgh Playhouse. He muses on Elon Musk, polar bear raves, the hilarious spectre of AI-generated sea shanties and predictions of the collapse of the teaspoon industry, all amplified with brilliant music on ever-more ambitious instruments, including the laser harp

programme.title: Nightmare Alley (2021)
programme.desc: An ambitious carnival worker with a talent for manipulating people joins forces with a female psychiatrist who is even more dangerous than he is. Guillermo del Toros thriller, starring Bradley Cooper, Cate Blanchett and Toni Collette

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsays visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Larks in Transit
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the 2020 Strictly champion in which he became the first British comedian to tread the boards of the Royal Opera House in Covent Garden, sharing tales from more than 20 years as a travelling performer. Topics include Google reviews of Poundland stores, a unique proposal for a Victorian-style Love Island and Old MacDonald sung in the style of Tom Waits. With a guest appearance by soprano Florence Hvorostovsky

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Seven players remain, all vying to win up to £100,000. But with five Predators and only two Prey, the competition must undergo a reset. As the rules of the game take a radical new direction, theres a brutal surprise for one player and a dramatic reversal of fortune for another. But its an agonising, heart-breaking decision forced onto one Prey that provides the biggest upset of the game so far

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Cardiff and Newport compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. Outspoken sisters Sue and Joyce do not enjoy the Asian-themed sushi offerings from Rachel and Mark, while discerning snail-breeding French foodie Philippe and his British wife Trish prove tough to impress

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners BandB owners hit back at the mens opinion of their establishments cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotels Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Celebrities Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton have just 30 minutes to complete their makes and impress Kirstie and experts Polly and Piyush. Here, the duo try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Spence introduces Doug to his new girlfriend, a professional chef - and Carrie is less than pleased when her husband becomes devoted to the culinary delights she produces. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Christen Nelson

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug plan a weekend visit to Atlantic City to celebrate the anniversary of their first date - but they are not the only ones making the trip. Before they know it, Dougs boss is along for the ride. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dozy Doug cheers up Deacon by taking him clubbing, and Carrie begins to feel threatened by a lookalike colleague. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Maries home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Paw Patrol: The Movie (2021)
programme.desc: When the crews biggest rival, Mayor Humdinger, becomes Mayor of nearby Adventure City and starts wreaking havoc, Ryder and the heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge head-on. While one of the pups must face his past in Adventure City, the team finds help from a new ally, the savvy dachshund Liberty. Animated adventure, starring Tyler Perry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Manor House Inn in Haltwhistle, Northumberland, run by Terry and Rachel. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of their room, revelling in the romance of the honeymoon suite. Over drinks, the BandBers size up the competition as they compare their hospitality experience, with one revealing that theyre a veteran of the industry. After a sound sleep for some, Dean wakes up with a headache thanks to a banging headboard, and things dont get any better for him at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Tom and Beckys Orchard Glamping in Lancashire hoping to prove their pristine pods are pitch perfect. Things are off to a good start but breakfast divides opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough with hosts Tony and Paula who humbly reveal themselves as King and Queen of the towns hospitality scene, but their crowns slip at breakfast when the guests are not amused

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where father-and-daughter team Dean and Abigail take great pride in their pub. The trip hits the skids when Terry and Rachel give their room a dusting down and Becky and Tom arent taken in by the view

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Theres a smorgasbord of slanderous sleep scores, brutal breakfast bombshells and even one couple declining the opportunity to face their competitors. Eventually, it is revealed who has won the competition

programme.title: The Boat Race
programme.desc: Clare Balding, Jamie Laing and Ade Adepitan present live coverage of the annual womens and mens rowing races between Oxford and Cambridge Universities on the River Thames. Cambridges recent dominance of the event continued last year, with them winning their sixth mens race out of the last seven and also claiming their eighth consecutive womens victory

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South East London and Devon Revisit
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Laurens dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, in the Tyneside seaside town of Whitley Bay. Sarah and Sean share a sprawling six-bedroom, three-storey Victorian semi-detached home with their five children. It may have plenty of sleeping space but the kitchens cramped, the gardens like a postage-stamp, and all seven of them share one bathroom. Sarah, whos deeply attached to their beachside lifestyle and her home-run re-usable cloth nappy business, insists that they stay, in the firm belief that knocking down walls will solve everything. But Seans done with the galley kitchen, lack of outside space, and constant chaos of seven people sharing one toilet! He dreads uncovering problems from a house that constantly fights back during renovations. Of course, Kirstie loves knocking down walls, and she has a £70,000 budget to modernise inside while also preserving the Victorian charm. But emergency maintenance soon stretches her funds to the limit. Meanwhile, Phil scours the market with his £650,000 budget, finding some stunning homes that tempt Sean. But Sarah digs in, which puts the final decision on a knifes edge. Will the family love their seaside semi, or list it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: The historic Settle to Carlisle line, travelling through some of Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cumbrias most stunning countryside and passing over the iconic Ribblehead Viaduct. The trains staff help out with a surprise wedding proposal and a 90th birthday celebration, while executive chef Nick creates masterpiece meals including a shin of Galloway beef and a trio of mini desserts

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of locals living along Yorkshires coastline. This episode features members of the Robson family from Bridlington, whove been fishing the North Sea for generations, as they head up the coast to Whitby for a boat repair. Volunteers at Bempton Cliffs work to protect and preserve almost half a million seabirds, and a group of sea swimmers take a full-moon sea swim at Scarborough

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill uncovers the importance of ancient stories in Vietnamese culture. Setting sail on a traditional junk boat, he weaves through the breathtakingly beautiful limestone karsts and mythical waters of Ha Long Bay, where legends of dragons live on. From floating villages to freshly caught mussels, and flesh-eating fish, Bill finds himself at the end of his adventure

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Thoughtifier
programme.desc: The comedian goes on a magical, musical mystery tour of the human mind in his 2025 stand-up show recorded live at the Edinburgh Playhouse. He muses on Elon Musk, polar bear raves, the hilarious spectre of AI-generated sea shanties and predictions of the collapse of the teaspoon industry, all amplified with brilliant music on ever-more ambitious instruments, including the laser harp

programme.title: Prey (2022)
programme.desc: In 1719 on the Northern Great Plains, Comanche tracker Naru undertakes a rite of passage to slay a ferocious predator. During a fierce tussle with a mountain lion, Naru glimpses strange lights in the treeline: a warning that a highly evolved, otherworldly creature with cloaking technology and explosive armaments is at large on the plains. Sci-fi thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Dakota Beavers. Directed by Dan Trachtenberg, who also helmed recent franchise offerings Predator: Killer of Killers, and Predator: Badlands

programme.title: Speed (1994)
programme.desc: An LAPD cop discovers a psychotic criminal has planted a bomb on a crowded bus, primed to go off if the vehicle drops below 50mph. He boards the vehicle and helps a hapless passenger who has been forced to take the wheel and keep a constant speed to avoid a disaster. Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsays visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits Manchester to bring an arts and crafts-inspired Edwardian home into the modern day. In London, he meets Flo, a first-time buyer whose flat needs a rejig to make it the sociable space she has always wanted

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Jonathan Mangum,chooses between bizarre potential suitors in Dating App, while guest Tiffany Coyne joins the cast for a disco-themed dubbing scene and a mind-bending round of Props

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: In Hollywood Director, Colin tackles a Spiderman bank heist scene using unashamed nudity, Elvis impressions and catwalk model poses. Guest starring The Walking Deads Lauren Cohan

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman tricks Butters into thinking he is in a virtual reality world, but they are not sure who is actually pulling the pranks

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys become embroiled in the world of competitive magic, and Randy shows them some of his tricks

programme.desc: A chance to see a show from the popular stand-up stars 2015 tour of the UK and Ireland, recorded as-live at the O2 in London. programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinsons clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless hero plans the Christmas holiday of a lifetime - but fate intervenes and pulls the rug out from under his feet, reducing what should have been the perfect festive season to a frantic comedy of errors. Slapstick, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French

programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joeys agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Ross joins Rachel on her first trip to a launderette, where a machine shortage leads to a tense stand-off. Phoebe and Chandler make a pact to break up with their partners, and Joey tricks a former girlfriend into believing Monica is the new woman in his life

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler begins a relationship with a married woman, Ross tries to liven up his conservative image and Joey lands a film role with a difference - as a naked body-double for Al Pacino

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut exposes Chandler to temptation by trapping him in a banks ATM lobby with only a stunning model for company. Ross has a hard time trying to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns something interesting about Monica

programme.desc: Everyone except Ross pools their money to buy lottery tickets, but a disagreement about how to spend any winnings prompts a disdainful Phoebe to make a rash gesture. programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. programme.sub-title: The One with the Home Study
programme.desc: Ross discovers Rachel has an irrational fear of swings, while Phoebe and Mike argue about whether to give their wedding fund to charity. The Bings learn Joey had a one-night stand with the adoption worker handling their case, and worry he has ruined their chances

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but the others all turn up late, so she and Chandler angrily lock them out - until an unexpected phone call changes their mood completely

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Extended highlights edition of the 2011 series of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock. Guests include Charlie Brooker, Sarah Millican, Gok Wan, Jack Dee, Jedward, Amy Childs, Micky Flanagan and Jack Whitehall

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the irreverent panel show, joined by team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock. The pair welcome boxer Amir Khan, actor-writer Richard Ayoade and comics Holly Walsh and Josh Widdicombe, who answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Actress Lea Thompson guests on the improvised comedy show with Wayne Brady, Jonathan Mangum, Colin Mochrie, Ryan Stiles and hosted by Aisha Tyler

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: Australian comedy set inside the offices of a government organisation responsible for major infrastructure projects. An international development deal is compromised by Rhondas decision to redesign the NBAs logo. Starring Rob Sitch and Celia Pacquola

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Comedy Central Live
programme.desc: Ventriloquist and comedian Jeff Dunham introduces viewers to his favourite dummies - Mitch the Super Hero, Peanut, Jose Jalapeno (on a stick) and Walter

programme.title: Jimmy Carrs Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: GK Barry, Jamali Maddix and Jimmmy pass judgement on people including a woman who lied about her age to a partner and a mother who took extreme measures over her daughters mess

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting RandB star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horners mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: Stephen Merchant and Karl Pilkington join Ricky to discuss some of their earliest memories. Karl recalls how his youth was spent with an overabundance of breath mints and shares his thoughts on a childhood leg injury, a visit to a massage therapist with dubious credentials, and his discovery of an enlightening adult magazine in a doctors waiting room

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: Karl Pilkington and Stephen Merchant join Ricky to contemplate the concept of memory, and Karl performs an unusual skit with Ricky in which he plays a lobe in his own brain. He also pretends to be the manager of a plumbing company and explains his thoughts on why Martians are more advanced than Earthlings, before describing what would happen if a horse walked into a bar

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Ryan and Colin tackle a gang of international criminals with the help of audience member noises, while the cast also make a visit to an adult-themed Sesame St in Scenes from a Hat

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: The rarely played Forward Rewind causes temporal chaos in a creepy hotel, while Scenes from a Hat explores inappropriate fist bumps, vomiting and evil TV shows

programme.title: Reno 911!
programme.desc: Dangle is promoted but must leave Reno and decides to settle a few scores before he says his goodbyes. Ben Garant and Thomas Lennon star

programme.title: Reno 911!
programme.desc: The department is faced with budget cuts, but it doesnt stop the deputy sheriffs from proving that no other law-enforcement officers are better at not doing their jobs

programme.title: Important Things with Demetri Martin
programme.desc: The American comedian tackles the theme of power, using sketches and animation to present his ideas, and explains the difference between gut instinct and other kinds of intuition

programme.title: Important Things with Demetri Martin
programme.desc: The American stand-up comedian presents sketches and monologues about brains, including Shakespeare, Galileo and Benjamin Franklin trying to woo a waitress and a rap based on thinking

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.sub-title: The One Where Dr Ramoray Dies

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Eddie Wont Go
programme.desc: Chandler begins to have grave doubts about new flatmate Eddie - just as Joey starts house-hunting. Meanwhile, the girls try to get in touch with their inner selves using a personal empowerment manual for inspiration. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Old Yeller Dies
programme.desc: Monicas boyfriend makes a good impression on Chandler and Joey. Phoebe gets a shock while watching a film and Rachel begins to resent Ross planning their future. US comedy, starring Courteney Cox, David Schwimmer and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Criminally Funny
programme.desc: Joe Thomas narrates another selection of lawless clips including bad drivers, vigilante OAPs and a mugging by a marsupial

programme.title: Criminally Funny
programme.desc: The show that lifts the lid on the funnier side of crime, with illegal idiocy including a law-breaking bride and a thief holding up a shop using a banana. Joe Thomas narrates

programme.title: Takeshis Castle
programme.desc: Game show in which contestants take on obstacle courses as they attempt to storm the castle. Narrated by Jonathan Ross

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, he is joined on stage by fellow stand-up Rob Beckett, and introduces an acrobatic dance performance by Romeo of the Cirque du Soleil. He also invites electro-pop trio Years and Years to play for the assembled live audience, and a handyman receives the surprise of his life when he becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show. Plus, Michael hijacks Strictly Come Dancing judge Bruno Toniolis mobile phone, composing another embarrassing message to deliver to his contacts in Celebrity Send To All

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show

This week, Michael introduces a music by Katherine Jenkins, who sings Heroes, and a performance by Scottish stage mentalist Colin Cloud. Former footballer Robbie Savage hands over his mobile phone for Celebrity Send To All, and an unsuspecting florist is given her moment in the spotlight in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. He introduces music by All Saints, while TV presenter Alex Jones hands over her mobile phone for Celebrity Send to All, and an unsuspecting plasterer is given his moment in the spotlight in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians family entertainment series returns, as Michael invites more stars to perform in front of a live audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. For this first edition, chart-topping, Grammy-nominated singer Ellie Goulding performs, and the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webbers new West End production School of Rock also take to the stage. An unsuspecting member of the public is dragged into the limelight when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show, and Michael gets up to more mischief when Olly Murs hands over his smartphone in Celebrity Send to All

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another Saturday night revue at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, he is joined by fellow funnyman Russell Howard, and invites all-American pop-rock quintet OneRepublic to perform on stage. An audience member approaching her 80th birthday receives the shock of her life when she plays Soap or Nope, and Pointless host Alexander Armstrong risks handing over his phone to Michael in Celebrity Send to All. Plus, the host goes undercover as he plots to spring a surprise on the youngest Unexpected Star yet

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians entertainment revue continues, as he invites fellow comedy star Sarah Millican to take to the stage, and indie-pop singer-songwriter Tom Odell also performs. Its Carol Vordermans turn to take up residence in the royal box, and Michael harrasses her friends and family via Sent To All, and a mother-of-two is given a moment in the spotlight when she becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show - but not before she pays a trip to the Unexpected Bar, where she bumps into her idol, Westlifes Shane Filan

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian introduces another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal. He is joined on stage by fellow funnyman Josh Widdicombe, and introduces an acrobatic performance by Canadian duo Chilly and Fly. Bryan Adams and Jess Glynne provide the nights musical diversions, and singer Ronan Keating risks his personal and professional relationships when he hands Michael his mobile phone in Celebrity Sent To All. Plus, a locksmith who thinks he has come to fix a faulty lock at the theatre receives the surprise of his life in Unexpected Star

programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.desc: Chandler begins a relationship with a married woman, Ross tries to liven up his conservative image and Joey lands a film role with a difference - as a naked body-double for Al Pacino

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool

However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire becomes a neighbourhood vigilante in the hope of stopping a motorist who has begun speeding through local streets. Jay teaches Manny to ride a bike, before discovering Gloria also needs lessons, while Mitch and Cameron befriend zany stranger Barry. Guest starring James Marsden (X-Men)

programme.title: Dance Moms: A New Era
programme.desc: The girls tackle a glammed-up group dance portraying drag queens, but a misunderstanding leads to a war of words between the moms

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A woman who loves swimming with sharks meets a man with a phobia of butterflies, while a rock singer hopes to meet someone who can understand her romantic dealings within the paranormal world. She bonds with youth worker and fellow musician James over shared passions. Retired fire-fighter Ian hasnt dated since his wife passed away. Can he re-ignite the flame of love?

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jays dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jays stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Damon Beesley and Iain Morriss blockbusting comedy sequel spun off from the hit sitcom, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and bingo pro Arunima shares a date with veterinary surgeon Simon. Arunima is in a wheelchair, and is worried Simon wont be able to see past her disability. These concerns are soon allayed though, as his inability to grasp bingo lingo takes precedence. Among others being paired up are retired factory worker Margaret and former bookmaker David - who has considered himself a long odds outsider at finding romance - and nursery worker Darcy, who is hoping to get a good reception from television aerial erector Aaron

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Zoe from London is confident but is finding it hard to meet someone who will embrace her sass and body hair. Derry from Wigan says his jet-set lifestyle is getting in the way of finding someone to settle down with. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d Fred hosts a special festive party in which he welcomes back some of the couples who found love in the restaurant, as well as three unlucky daters returning for a second chance at romance. Supermarket worker Luke, fireman Paul and eccentric theology student Louisa are all determined not to be left alone under the mistletoe by the end of the night, while the successful pairings are all happy to be back at the place they found love - and when one of the lovers surprises their partner by getting down on one knee, it makes it a Christmas they will never forget

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As spring break arrives, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into an ill-advised discount vacation. Beverly struggles when Adam considers taking time off after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King
programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Three teams battle it out in the grand finale, with 28 hours to showcase their skills in their most impressive builds yet before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The teams travel to the beautiful Indian coastal state of Kerala. Navigating the waterways of the West Coast Canal System, the celeb pairs must choose between tiger body painting or a traditional kids game, before an intense experience learning to drive a tuk-tuk. Finally, they must eat their way through a bowlful of bananas until they find a blue one, with one duo getting more than a gutful

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Following their flirty chats, Kit and Inga head out on a date, leaving Jazz questioning why the news is bothering her so much. Jules brother Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs, telling everyone - including Jules boyfriend Tristan - that Chuggs fancies Jules. Freddy also finds himself caught in the middle, with his loyalties split between Angus and Jack

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit as alliances fracture, one marriage ends and the experiment is left permanently shaken

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two new couples enter the experiment but, when big personalities clash, the new marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe join hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood in the tent. The celebrity bakers take on decorated traybakes in the Signature and a tarte tatin Technical, then reveal their most coveted toys from childhood in showstopping biscuits

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally destroys the familys Christmas presents and evades blame by claiming they were stolen by a burglar, prompting the Springfield residents to open their hearts and wallets in an overwhelming show of charity toward the family. With the guest voice of American TV presenter Alex Trebek

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Martin and Roman Kemp, Rylan and his mum Linda, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Stacey Solomon and Joe Swash, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Jane McDonald and her best friend Sue, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Rob Beckett and Tom Allen, Melanie C and her brother Paul, and Gyles Brandreth with Lulu appraise George Clarkes Amazing Spaces, 90 Day Fiance UK, Americas Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, Swamp People: Serpent Invasion, The Mole, The Woman in Black, and the BBCs coverage of the general election. First shown in July 2024

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: As the Goggleboxers hang up their Christmas stockings, a bumper edition of the show takes a very merry look back at the best of 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains favourite opinionated TV viewers share their sharp, insightful, passionate, and sometimes emotional critiques of 2023s biggest and best shows. Programmes covered include Planet Earth III, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, First Dates, Coronation Street, The Good Ship Murder, HELP! My House Is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small, Family Fortunes and Open House: The Great Sex Experiment

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. At first glance, Gary is no Mr Darcy, but the chartered surveyor assures her that this doesnt make him boring - while trying to determine how many bricks make up the restaurant. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. Meanwhile, fortysomething Jo is partnered with Richard Gere lookalike Gus, and Italian Paolo is paired with hotel receptionist Daniel

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vicky and her husband Ercan decide whether they should start a family. In this first episode of two, Vicky throws herself into finding out what life with a child might be like by helping to look after a friends young daughter. She also returns to the fertility clinic where her frozen eggs and embryos are being stored, confronting the reality of her ticking body clock

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: One Day, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Boarders and The Rescue are among the shows appraised by the amateur critics. They also offer their thoughts of ITVs news coverage of MP Lee Anderson, following controversial comments he made regarding London Mayor Sadiq Khan. From March 2024

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Something unprecedented happens in the First Dates restaurant tonight. When stunning 25-year-old Sasha is stood up, an unexpected knight in shining armour is waiting in the wings - waiter Sam. Meanwhile, 38-year-old sales manager Scott, who is looking for someone to mend his broken heart after the failure of an eight-year relationship, meets 28-year-old PA Victoria, and 55-year-old receptionist Debbie has her first date with a woman, in the shape of 59-year-old divorced security guard Ann

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haleys decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while his bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. As Jack recruits the Grim Reaper and covers Beckas wedding dress in fake blood, he hopes his eerie marital concept will prove a screaming success and not a fright night disaster

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchells friends mistakenly assume they have split up, while Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner as a thank you for Claire and Phils support with the twins. Meanwhile, Phil thinks he has a chance to reclaim his dignity after their first outing 10 years ago went so wrong when Jay invites him and Dylan along to fly his model plane

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlies Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owners lack of business nous is putting her relatives homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurants food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Ren decides to host an Earth Day telethon, Barry vows to help her book some A-list talent. Beverly and her nemesis square off to find a perfect match for Bill

programme.title: The Goldbergs
