However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As spring break arrives, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into an ill-advised discount vacation. Beverly struggles when Adam considers taking time off after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King
programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Three teams battle it out in the grand finale, with 28 hours to showcase their skills in their most impressive builds yet before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The teams travel to the beautiful Indian coastal state of Kerala. Navigating the waterways of the West Coast Canal System, the celeb pairs must choose between tiger body painting or a traditional kids game, before an intense experience learning to drive a tuk-tuk. Finally, they must eat their way through a bowlful of bananas until they find a blue one, with one duo getting more than a gutful

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Following their flirty chats, Kit and Inga head out on a date, leaving Jazz questioning why the news is bothering her so much. Jules brother Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs, telling everyone - including Jules boyfriend Tristan - that Chuggs fancies Jules. Freddy also finds himself caught in the middle, with his loyalties split between Angus and Jack

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit as alliances fracture, one marriage ends and the experiment is left permanently shaken

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two new couples enter the experiment but, when big personalities clash, the new marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe join hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood in the tent. The celebrity bakers take on decorated traybakes in the Signature and a tarte tatin Technical, then reveal their most coveted toys from childhood in showstopping biscuits

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally destroys the familys Christmas presents and evades blame by claiming they were stolen by a burglar, prompting the Springfield residents to open their hearts and wallets in an overwhelming show of charity toward the family. With the guest voice of American TV presenter Alex Trebek

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Martin and Roman Kemp, Rylan and his mum Linda, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Stacey Solomon and Joe Swash, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Jane McDonald and her best friend Sue, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Rob Beckett and Tom Allen, Melanie C and her brother Paul, and Gyles Brandreth with Lulu appraise George Clarkes Amazing Spaces, 90 Day Fiance UK, Americas Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, Swamp People: Serpent Invasion, The Mole, The Woman in Black, and the BBCs coverage of the general election. First shown in July 2024

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: As the Goggleboxers hang up their Christmas stockings, a bumper edition of the show takes a very merry look back at the best of 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains favourite opinionated TV viewers share their sharp, insightful, passionate, and sometimes emotional critiques of 2023s biggest and best shows. Programmes covered include Planet Earth III, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, First Dates, Coronation Street, The Good Ship Murder, HELP! My House Is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small, Family Fortunes and Open House: The Great Sex Experiment

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. At first glance, Gary is no Mr Darcy, but the chartered surveyor assures her that this doesnt make him boring - while trying to determine how many bricks make up the restaurant. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. Meanwhile, fortysomething Jo is partnered with Richard Gere lookalike Gus, and Italian Paolo is paired with hotel receptionist Daniel

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vicky and her husband Ercan decide whether they should start a family. In this first episode of two, Vicky throws herself into finding out what life with a child might be like by helping to look after a friends young daughter. She also returns to the fertility clinic where her frozen eggs and embryos are being stored, confronting the reality of her ticking body clock

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Green Tea Salmon and Modern Greek Salad
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare green tea salmon, coconut rice and miso greens, as well as modern Greek salad with spinach, chickpea and feta parcels, all within the space of 15 minutes

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates his own brand of fast food, preparing smoked salmon with Yorkshire pudding, beets and asparagus, as well as cooking Greek chicken accompanied by sweet pepper and pea couscous with tzatziki

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 2kg Irish breakfast challenge at Flann OBriens Pub

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a breakfast sandwich challenge

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: When Carlos bakery is renovated, workmen uncover a long-buried message intended for Buddys father. The baker works on a cake for Frank Sinatra

programme.desc: The owner of a Brazilian restaurant requests a carnival-themed cake for one of her lavish parties

programme.desc: The acclaimed chef demonstrates how to prepare stunning dishes. He serves fish quenelles, chicken cooked in salt crust pastry and red wine poached pears

programme.title: Michel Rouxs Provence Masterclass
programme.desc: Michel serves up a feast that is made to share. He prepares a smoked fish platter, a rich beef cheek bourguignon and a lattice-topped salted caramel and walnut tart

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel visits a family-run vineyard to get an important ingredient for his monkfish dish. Later, he reveals his simple recipe for pate grand-mere

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel Roux Jr showcases the unique cuisine of Southern France. He shares his secrets to easily mastering French Country cooking at home

programme.title: Roux Down the River
programme.desc: Michel goes fishing with an old friend and makes an alfresco fish dish by the river. Plus, he makes watercress soup, a winter salad, and roast apples

programme.title: Roux Down the River
programme.desc: In Southend, Michel meets a family of fishmongers and chefs keeping it local. Plus, he makes scallop curry, prawn toast, and fried custard beignets

programme.title: Roux Back Down the River
programme.desc: At Royal Windsor, Michel finds the perfect fish and chips and visits Monkey Island. He cooks a mackerel burger, shepherds pie and a peach meringue

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom creates classic double acts with two key ingredients. On the menu are fish and chips, steak and ale pie and bread and butter pudding

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: In the pub, a traditional shepherds pie is given an Indian twist. Plus, Tom cooks lamb curry, Thai fishcakes and spiced pineapple tarte tatin

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom brings an all-time favourite dish to his Sunday table - fish and chips. He bakes a beautiful side of salmon in brown butter and makes perfect triple-cooked chips

programme.title: Tom Kerridge More Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom pays homage to the South of France. He makes a seafood bouillabaisse with sea bass, red mullet and shellfish, and praline and chocolate profiteroles

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge and food writer demonstrates quick and simple recipes designed to take the stress out of cooking for family and friends, as well as sharing some of her memories of her life, family and friends. In the first programme, Mary preparing five dishes suitable for special days and celebrations, including salmon fillets with herbs and red pepper and a side dish of spiralised vegetables and an indulgent treat of lobster tails with aioli and asparagus

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for outdoor entertaining and lazy summer days, beginning with a whole seabass with lime and dill butter. Mary then meets experts Jules and Nick to have a go at catching crayfish in the waters of Oxfordshire, before using the crustaceans in an oriental vegetable salad. She then demonstrates simple recipes for lamb burgers with mint mayo, and smoked Texan chicken wings, and finishes with refreshing lemon and elderflower jellies

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef visits Naples, Italy, where he discovers an abundance of seafood and rich colourful sauces, and later experiences North Sea cod with cabbage and beer in Suffolk

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef reproduces popular local fish dishes in Goa, and there is a visit to the kitchen of a Cornish restaurant

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: The globetrotting chef samples cuisine from Galicia in Spain, including a rare shellfish dish and hake cooked with peppers and saffron

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef catches turbot off the Cornish coast to take home and cook with cider and cream, then heads off to the Indian resort of Goa where he prepares local recipes including prawn caldene and spicy Goan lobster

programme.title: Jamies Fish Supper
programme.sub-title: Pan-Seared Trout with Beets and Horseradish Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver cooks up recipes to inspire fish-lovers to try different and sustainable types of seafood, preparing pan-seared trout with beets and horseradish sauce

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver continues to present quick and easy recipes. In this edition, he prepares flashy fish stew with saffron sauce and garlic bread, before making seared Asian beef, best noodle salad and ginger dressing

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver prepares more quick meals, including fish baps, mushy peas and tartare sauce, plus mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: White Fish Tagine and Spicy Cajun Chicken
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares a selection of dishes including white fish tagine, carrot, mint and clementine salad, spicy Cajun chicken, smashed sweet potato and fresh corn salsa

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Asian Fish and Ultimate Pork Tacos
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver prepares a selection of dishes including Asian fish, miso noodles and crunchy vegetables. Plus, ultimate pork tacos, spicy black beans and avocado garden salad

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Dishes include grilled tuna, kinda Nicoise salad, Thai chicken laksa and mildly spiced noodle squash broth as Jamie Oliver continues to demonstrate his own brand of fast food

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: The chef demonstrates his own brand of fast food by showing viewers how to prepare two quick recipes. This time, he rustles up seared Asian tuna, coconut rice and jiggy jiggy greens, plus ricotta fritters, tomato sauce and courgette salad

programme.desc: Fly fishing and lobster on the lawn, Michel enjoys the high life, cooking up a lamb stew, roast duck, halibut with saffron and sherry and a summer pudding

programme.desc: Adam Richman tries to drink nearly a gallon of milkshake in St Louis, Missouri

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge gives step-by-step instructions for the perfect Sunday lunch as she cooks for three generations of her family. For the main course she prepares slow-roasted shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, served with potato and fennel gratin, and dishes up plum tarte Tatin with fruit salad for dessert

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge gives advice on making a casual weekday supper for sharing around the kitchen table with friends or family. She prepares a Mediterranean platter of houmous, breadsticks, roasted vegetables and tomato and mozzarella salad, as well as lamb dhansak, cottage pie topped with dauphinoise potatoes, and a pasta dish that takes just 15 minutes. She also shows to make elderflower cordial and a crunchy apple crumble

programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: The food writer demonstrates a range of recipes to tempt family and friends, featuring classics, simple British dishes and modern favourites. In the first edition, Mary indulges her love of comfort food with heartwarming recipes including eggs Benedict Florentine, slow-cooked lamb shanks, and deliciously rich chocolate truffle pots, before enjoying open-fire cooking with Swedish chef Niklas Esktedt

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel meets organic rose winemaker, Raphael Pommery and cooks new season lamb. Later, he makes pork rillettes and a nougat glace with raspberry coulis

programme.desc: The chef shares his method for slow cooking joints of meat, including spicy slow cooked lamb shoulder, sweet and sticky short ribs and pulled beef brisket in a bun

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Barbecues
programme.desc: Tom explores some seriously spicy flavours on his BBQ. He makes fragrant lamb koftas, spicy sweet potato burgers and curried BBQ monkfish

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom shares his love for the heat of the pub kitchen. Rotisserie beetroot, blow-torched mackerel and a flambeed brandy sauce are all on the menu

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom celebrates spring with a Sunday lunch classic - roast lamb. He slow-cooks it over layers of thinly sliced potatoes, served with a delicious cheesy broccoli gratin

programme.title: Tom Kerridge More Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom shares his speedy method for the perfect roast lamb with salsa verde and minty potatoes. For dessert, he makes an apricot pie with almond crumble

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. He begins with a simple frying-pan pasta, a clever twist on a fish pie thats full of flavour with none of the fuss, and a sublime roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie takes midweek meals up a notch, as he knocks out a flavour-packed, simple gnocchi supper and giant spicy meatballs full of delicious time-saving cheats. He also turns a family favourite on its head with his upside-down fish pie

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: The chef prepares the perfect meals for social events, beginning with a celebratory meal for family and friends to make up for 18 months of missed family milestones. He showcases a slow-roasted, rolled shoulder of lamb with a fennel, sage and spicy sausage stuffing, drizzled with a herby green sauce made with pistachio, mint and parsley. On the side, Jamie pairs it with crispy lemon roast potatoes, garlicky dressed French beans and a thyme and apricot sauce. He also creates rainbow tomato crostini topped with crumbly cheese, mango caipirinha cocktails, and individual yoghurt panna cottas with elderflower strawberries and a crushed biscuit crumb

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares roast shoulder of lamb with all the trimmings, before turning the leftovers into Moroccan-style crispy pastillas, and makes good use of stale bread by using it as part of a panzanella salad. The chef also shows a lover of takeaways how to dish up a beef rendang from the remains of a cut of brisket, and helps two people reduce their food waste

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver continues to demonstrate his own brand of fast food by showing viewers how to prepare lamb lollipops, curry sauce, rice and peas, as well as prawn linguini and Sicilian shaved fennel salad

Sci-fi drama, updating HG Wells novel to a 20th-century setting, starring Gene Barry, Ann Robinson and Les Tremayne

programme.title: The Odessa File (1974)
programme.desc: The detailed diaries of a former inmate of a concentration camp fall into the hands of an investigative journalist. Incensed by what he reads, he embarks on a crusade to discover the prison commandants new identity and expose his crimes to the world. In the process, the trail leads him to a secret organisation that helped Nazi SS officers escape justice. Thriller, based on Frederick Forsyths novel, starring Jon Voight, Derek Jacobi and siblings Maria and Maximilian Schell

Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.desc: A steelworker caring for his terminally ill father is reunited with his younger brother, who has returned from service in Iraq. However, the former soldier becomes involved with a criminal gang and disappears without trace. The elder brother is frustrated at the polices failure to find him and takes matters into his own hands. Crime thriller, starring Christian Bale, Woody Harrelson and Zoe Saldana

programme.desc: A doctor moves into a spacious new apartment, and becomes attracted to her landlord. However, she does not realise he is becoming dangerously obsessed with her, constructing elaborate hiding places to spy on her. His behaviour becomes increasingly sinister, and her reconciliation with her ex-boyfriend drives him into a murderous rage. Horror, with Hilary Swank, Jeffrey Dean Morgan and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Satanic Rites of Dracula (1973)
programme.desc: Blood-sucking Transylvanian Count Dracula rises from the grave to terrorise Seventies London, with a plan to unleash a deadly plague on the world. But a descendant of the unflappable vampire hunter Van Helsing is hot on his trail. Shoddy Hammer horror marking Christopher Lees last appearance as the vampire, which is a pale shadow of its predecessors. Peter Cushing, Joanna Lumley, Freddie Jones and William Franklyn also star

programme.desc: Explorer Allan Quatermain is lured back into the African jungles to find a man who disappeared while searching for the fabled King Solomons Mines. Adventure, with Patrick Swayze

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman is forced to undergo an operation which makes her look and think like everyone else. With Collin Wilcox and Suzy Parker

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien force arrives on Earth with the intention of conquering its inhabitants

programme.title: Money Train (1995)
programme.desc: A New York cop in debt to loan sharks persuades his foster brother and fellow police officer to rob a train carrying all the days takings from the citys subway network. However, things start to go wrong when a female detective creates rivalry between the pair, and a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans. Action comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes, Jennifer Lopez and Chris Cooper

programme.title: Below (2002)
programme.desc: A shell-shocked US submarine crew embarks on a routine mission in the Pacific during the Second World War. After stopping to pick up the three survivors of a torpedoed British hospital ship, an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events drives the crew into madness as they wander the claustrophobic corridors of their cramped vessel. Horror, starring Olivia Williams, Holt McCallany, Bruce Greenwood and Matthew Davis

programme.title: Last Passenger (2013)
programme.desc: A widowed doctor travelling by train with his son realises that the mysterious driver has cut the brakes and they are speeding toward a fatal collision. With the aid of four of his fellow passengers, they try to find a way to avert the disaster. Thriller, starring Dougray Scott, Kara Tointon and Lindsay Duncan

programme.title: Lust for a Vampire (1970)
programme.desc: A writer is aghast to discover a seemingly well-to-do girl in a private school is actually a blood-sucking creature of the night. Hammer horror, starring Ralph Bates, Michael Johnson and Suzanna Leigh

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Young parents Nicole and Stefian arrive in resus with their 19-month-old daughter XahNae, who is unresponsive and has a high fever, and doctors fear she may have a life-threatening infection. Meanwhile, the team suspects 61-year-old Christine has suffered a second stroke in 10 years, and 52-year-old Graham, who has Downs syndrome, is brought into AandE by his sisters following an accident

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Maulden, Yvonne collapses with a cardiac arrest. Its a race against the clock as the heli-medics try to help. In the Peaks, medics land on top of a steep ridge to rescue Donna, who has collapsed while walking. A motorcyclist collides with a car trying to avoid ducks crossing the road and medics fear multiple fractures

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man involved in a car crash needs to be carefully removed from his vehicle to protect his spine, though a fuel leak means the fire service cannot risk cutting the roof off. A man with chest pains is worried hes having a heart attack, a 19-year-old falls down the stairs and suspects hes fractured his ankle, while an elderly mans vital signs are pointing towards one of the UKs biggest killers

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition sees staff at Kings College Hospital in south London treat patients involved in serious road accidents. Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Sitting in the Yorkshire Dales National Park, the campers find themselves at The Dalesbridge where bad weather and a feathery fiasco cause tempers to fray. It remains to be seen whether the stunning scenery and live music will win over the campers as they reveal this weeks perfect pitch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Justin gives Tina and Kay a platform for their feedback about noisy trains and seeks to know more about Raqeebs problems with his shower. Tina and Kay want to clear up Raqeeb and Rajs cleanliness comments before discussing what really happened at breakfast. After dramatic discoveries and frank exchanges, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Pembrokeshire to meet a cattle breeder whose barns include a pair of discarded horns, and a camper van fan with a vintage pedal car

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sisters Lynne and Samantha enjoyed many happy childhood holidays together in Spain. Now they dream of jointly buying a property for their families to build similar fond memories, and have chosen the beautiful countryside of inland Cádiz as their ideal location. Danni Menzies has been tasked with finding them a village house with two bedrooms and plenty of outside space, and lines up five options for their £60,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer James hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from Edinburgh, hoping to impress guests Aisling, Bruce and Katy with a spicy Mexican menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Edinburgh is 69-year-old grandmother Katy, who is hoping that her out-of-season Xmas Tartan-themed evening will put her guests in a yuletide mood

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous solicitor Aisling hosts the third dinner party in Edinburgh and throws a traditional Irish party, with a piper at the door to welcome her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: American writer Harry serves up a menu inspired by family on day four in Edinburgh - but the evening starts with a bang and does not get any less surreal thanks to Katys stories

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: ts the final night in Edinburgh, hosted by food and fashion-conscious Bruce. All week Bruce has expressed his desire for the finer things in life and his dislike of anything that falls below his high standards, so expectations are high. Can Bruce pull the evening off with style, and will he do enough to grab the cash?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Just B in Edinburgh, owned by Karen MacDonald and Geoff Thomson, who hope that their slice of Zen will impress their guests. Nick and Stefan are forced to comply with the house rules in some alternative attire, while Tony and Natalie make some dirty discoveries in their dog-friendly room. At dinner, the hosts serve up their spiritual side, and the competition hots up as Stefan reveals his hospitality pedigree. In the morning, a mushroom misdemeanour leaves a bad taste in Tonys mouth

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Glencoe Villa Guesthouse in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, owned by Ewa Hunt, who is joined by her best friend, Ellie. The homely styled bedrooms arent to everyones taste, and at dinner theres a debate about how to host. At breakfast, some guests pick holes in the pre-order system, and in the kitchen Ewas under pressure

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Fox Inn in Stourton, Staffordshire, owned by uncle and nephew Stefan Carron and Nick Edwards. Most of their guests are bowled over by the bedrooms, but Tony isnt wild about the decor. At dinner, Stefan impresses with some serious celebrity name dropping and Tony reveals his alternative approach to taking on staff. At breakfast, pro chef Nick pulls out all the stops with his presentation, but missing items mean feedback falls short from Tony

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The New Inn in Newton, Derbyshire, owned by Tony Carlin, whos joined by his partner Natalie Briggs. On first impressions the guests feel its lacking luxury, and Ewa and Ellie have cleanliness concerns. At dinner, the luxury label is called into question, and a bust up over the self-service breakfast is narrowly avoided. At breakfast time, the hosts do a disappearing act, which doesnt go down well with their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Just B is first, and owners Karen and Geoff get some answers while hearing the truth from guests on their hair-raising stay

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Oxfordshire to collect a 1973 Porsche 911 Targa. The run-down car belongs to Ben, whos had the motor for around 35 years. However, due to life getting in the way, and developing early onset dementia, he has been unable to get the car running. Wife Jeannetta and friend Andy hope that Car S.O.S can breathe new life into this old classic

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to a barn in Somerset where a run-down Jeep Grand Cherokee is stored. It belongs to former soldier Ben, who, after sustaining life-altering injuries in the line of duty, has made it his duty to inspire and help others. However, his vehicle doesnt inspire much confidence in Tim and Fuzz as they have to turn this beaten-down classic into an off-road machine

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps ballet dancer Nicol and his brother Harry get on the property ladder, exploring potential new homes in north-east London. Phil Spencer helps Tinder success story Hiren and Priyanka, who have been searching for a home for a year following a whirlwind romance

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with home-owners they have previously met on the programme to see how they have got on since they helped them make their decisions. In this episode, Phil catches up with Kathleen and Tom who chose to renovate their three-bedroom Victorian terrace in Gosforth, Newcastle

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Marinellas son has gone missing and she s convinced that he has been abducted. Blanca notices a detail in a voice message that seems to confirm her fears, and shortly afterwards, CCTV footage is found of a young man forcing the child into his car. However, it later emerges that the man in the footage has also been kidnapped and a ransom request has been received. In Italian

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Charlie has life-threatening injuries after coming off his dirt bike from a great height. The heli-medics race to treat him as a matter of great urgency. Worried parents watch on as medics treat their five-year-old child who is having seizures

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bill, 92, arrives at Kings with breathing difficulties and a swollen leg and test results suggest there may be something seriously wrong, while 25-year-old Sarah is finding it hard to stand up and has been brought in by her mum and grandfather. She has learning difficulties as a result of an inherited genetic disorder and doctors are concerned she may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A motorcycle collision on the M25 creates chaos as the heli-medics close carriageways to treat a driver with an injured leg. A runner has a cardiac arrest during a park run and the heli-medics rush to the scene to give lifesaving treatment. Medics near Shepshed are called in to assist Glenn, who has fallen down the stairs fracturing his femur

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bill, 92, arrives at Kings with breathing difficulties and a swollen leg and test results suggest there may be something seriously wrong, while 25-year-old Sarah is finding it hard to stand up and has been brought in by her mum and grandfather. She has learning difficulties as a result of an inherited genetic disorder and doctors are concerned she may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Three groups of campers explore The Highlands of Scotland. Their first stop is Aberfeldy Caravan Park on the river Tay, where a ceilidh and some whitewater rafting are on the cards

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Lincolnshire farmers David and Debbie, who are looking for a holiday home, in and around the town of Coin in Spains Málaga Province. The pair want a place thats big enough to house their five children and Woody, their horse, within a budget of £230,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman heads to Spains Almería coastline to help house-hunters Jacqueline and Lynne find their dream holiday home. The search is focused on the town of Roquetas de Mar, where Ben locates five impressive properties to show them

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Semi-retired childrens nurse Tracey is looking for a holiday home in La Duquesa on Spains Costa del Sol and she brings along her friend Jackie for moral support. Property expert Jasmine Harman has five attempts to find Tracey the perfect place on a budget of £140,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Andrea and Gary from Grimsby and Northumberland find their perfect holiday home in St Lucia with a budget of £205,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Creates Monmouth in Monmouthshire, where a peaceful nights sleep is ruined by an early morning fire alarm and a lack of privacy bothers one guest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals stay over at Coastal Park Accommodation in Llanelli, where an evening drinks session turns tense when Billy confronts hosts Claire and Tony about their business model

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third location is the Queens at Horton in Shropshire, run by Tracy and Billy Scott. The rivals are wowed by the luxury rooms - until Tracy finds a screw loose, that is

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners converge at Caroline Weavers Whychurch Farm Glamping in Wiltshire. Kenny and Ben are pleasantly surprised by the cleanliness, but Billy and Tracy feel a little cramped in their pod. A day spent helping out on the on-site farm isnt to everyones taste, but an evening barbecue is a massive hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day finds the BandBers ready to settle some scores. First to get some answers on their feedback are Kenny and Ben, who want to take a peek at Carolines privacy issues and reveal why they found her sleep score alarming. Next, Tony and Claire confront Kenny and Ben on a wee problem, and chew over Billy and Tracys breakfast score - who in turn want to clear up Claire and Tonys cleanliness comments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host on a week in and around Norwich is mind reader and magician Anthony, who conjures up an evening full of surprising confessions and dishes that are close to his heart

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Norwich, wham bam thank you glam cleaner Hannah, treats her guests to a touch of class, glitz and glamour. With celebrity sightings, WAG confessions and in-your-face party tricks, Hannah goes all out to polish off the competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Service manager Jess hosts, on the third day in and around Norwich. She plans a menu of nutritious nosh and asks everyone to come as their favourite singer, so they can give their own rendition of their most-loved songs during the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in and around Norwich, chatty mobile hairdresser Sarah is confident that her menu of family favourites will be a cut above the rest. With an evening full of bedroom surprises, hair-raising ghostly conversations and extravagant singing and dancing, she hopes to have done enough to bag the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night of the week in and around Norwich, surgeon and all-round foodie Luke hosts an evening full of flavour, quality and skill. With his surgical precision and skills, can he impress his guests, or will they find his scallops, Sri Lankan curry and apricot tarte Tatin too much to stomach?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Birkdale on Merseyside, at Nista Boutique Rooms run by Ian and Sally Lawless. Stylish mother-and-daughter duo Suzie and Dani are impressed by the set-up, and Linda and her friend Lany love the gigantic showers. However, Ian and Sallys chances suffer a setback when married couple Mark and Sean discover strange green goo in the bathroom. After a trip to a local lawnmower museum proves a surprising hit, the hosts go all-out to lay on an impressive breakfast spread

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the second visit, the BandBers head to Oakleigh Guest House in Blackpool, where breakfast and a trip to Madame Tussauds prove a hit - but there is still some harsh feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues as Linda Milner and her friend Lany welcome their guests to Bay House in Scarborough for a socially distanced stay amid the Covid pandemic. One couple are impressed with the grandiose style of their high-ceilinged room, and theres a shock in store when its revealed that another pair have had to drop out of the competition. Over dinner, everyone discusses how the pandemic has affected them. Confusion reigns at breakfast, denting Lindas scores, and, when she sees her feedback, she finds herself questioning her rivals motives

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Farrier in Cayton, North Yorkshire is the weeks final destination, run by mother-and-daughter duo Suzie and Dani Bushby. The luxurious rooms go down very well with their guests, before the BandBers enjoy a day meeting Danis horses at the familys manor home. During dinner the contestants shed a tear as they reflect fondly on the competition. However, just as Suzie and Dani think theyre on the home straight, some issues arise at bedtime for Mark and Sean

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners reunite to settle some scores. Mark and Sean are keen to find out why one pair of guests wouldnt stay at their Oakleigh Guest House again, while Linda and Lany are annoyed about some nitpicking feedback about the flowers in their rooms at Bay House in Scarborough. Later, the payments and winner are revealed

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Peggy, 85, arrives at the hospital by ambulance, having injured her knee at home. Its the second time she has fallen in two months and medics want to find out if theres a more serious underlying cause. Meanwhile, the team keeps a close eye on 75-year-old Bob, who has had a suspected heart attack, and Ben, 25, isnt overly concerned by his swollen finger, until a doctor diagnoses cellulitis

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schoolboy Eddie, 12, is brought into AandE having been hit by a car on his way home from school, and doctors are concerned he may have suffered a bleed on the brain, as well as damage to his kidneys. Meanwhile, 64-year-old Linda, who breathes with the help of a tracheostomy, arrives at Kings after experiencing respiratory failure at home, and student Amy, 20, has been coughing up blood

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. Its Red Nose Day, but theres little to laugh about for 33-year-old Dilson, who is rushed in with knife wounds to his head and neck after being attacked outside a nightclub. Meanwhile, 79-year-old Doreen has broken her wrist in a fall at home, and parents Keeley and Michael are concerned by the fact their toddler Cydney hasnt urinated for two days

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics scramble to the Peak District, where a dirt-buggy smash has left a rider with serious injuries. A farm worker tears his arm using a potato harvester, and Daryl receives three rapid shocks as the medics race to his aid amid concerns of a cardiac arrest

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day finds the BandBers ready to settle some scores. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host on a week in and around Norwich is mind reader and magician Anthony, who conjures up an evening full of surprising confessions and dishes that are close to his heart

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: On the fourth day in and around Norwich, chatty mobile hairdresser Sarah is confident that her menu of family favourites will be a cut above the rest. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Over dinner, everyone discusses how the pandemic has affected them. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of Chinas Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the countrys cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: With access to the first nationwide survey and state-of-the-art drones mapping the Great Wall of China, this documentary offers new evidence that reveals its extraordinary magnitude, rewrites its millennia-long history and decodes its complex signals system. Using cutting-edge chemistry, the programme also finds out what has kept the wall standing for so long - a simple cooking ingredient found in kitchens across the world

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn relive the golden age of steam. They begin by exploring how the introduction of steam railways in the early 19th century created a domestic revolution, from the way people lived to the food they ate. Arriving at Ffestiniog Railway in Snowdonia, they find out how millions of tons of slate were moved down the mountain, while underground, Alex experiences the brutal conditions face by miners in the Llechwedd Quarry

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn continue to relive the golden age of steam and how the Victorian railways created modern Britain. They visit Beamish in County Durham, learning how the rail companies first realised there was money to be made in moving people rather than commodities. Then Peter and Alex live the life of navvies, the men who built the thousands of miles of tracks in all weather conditions, and Ruth finds out what impact the new railroads had on the cottage industries. She also learns about the role of the guard, and the trio learn what precautions were necessary for taking a long journey on a train that was yet to include the necessary facilities

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians reveal how the railways transformed the British diet, rescuing a nation that was struggling to feed itself. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn discover how the mass transportation of livestock gave birth to the traditional British roast, and Ruth Goodman is in Whitby, which became a thriving fishing town thanks to the North Yorkshire Moors Railway supplying its kippers. Plus, Hampshires watercress line, which brought nutritional salad to the masses, and how the use of steam-powered engines revolutionised production at Britains oldest brewery

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians take a trip on the Flying Scotsman, arguably the most famous locomotive in the world, along its original route connecting London and Edinburgh - the two most important financial capitals of the Empire. Peter Ginn explores how the railways revolutionised the delivery of mail across Britain, he and Alex Langlands learn about the first electronic communication service - more than 100 years before the arrival of email - and Ruth finds out about the role of the wheeltapper. Plus, why do some railway clocks have more than one minute hand?

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotlands most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team discover how the combination of increased leisure time and affordable rail transport brought a new kind of freedom for working-class Victorians. Ruth Goodman travels along the south Devon coast from Paignton to Kingswear, where she helps prepare a paddle steamer for a journey up the River Dart, while at Swanage, Peter Ginn finds out what it was like to work on the excursion trains and the impact mass tourism had on the area

programme.title: Sicily: The Conquered Isle
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary exploring Sicilys ancient past when it was the breadbasket of the ancient and then medieval world and as such, occupied by Greeks, Romans, Carthaginians, Arabs and Normans

programme.title: Sicily: The Conquered Isle
programme.desc: Part two of two. The islands role on the frontlines of a clash of civilisations during the Spanish era, when its glorious baroque buildings were also created. The programme also explores Sicilys role in the unification of Italy, which led to the coming of the Mafia

programme.title: Edward VIII: Britains Traitor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring evidence that Edward VIII may have collaborated with the Nazis following his abdication in 1936, as well as the establishment cover-up of his loyalties that occurred following the war. Historians examine the possibility that the former king may have passed information to known spies and been complicit in a plot to reinstate him to the throne in the event of Britain being successfully occupied

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May goes to Cheyenne to visit a supercomputer. In Michigan, she observes the explosive end of a coal plant. Returning to Atlanta, Maiya and Dr Marshall Shepard discuss climate challenges and vulnerabilities in the United States

programme.desc: In 1976, Jamaica is dangerously divided across political lines and musician Bob Marley vows to quell the violence by performing at the Smile Jamaica Concert. Biographical drama, starring Kingsley Ben-Adir, Lashana Lynch and James Norton

programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: The final episode of the series is devoted to the return of one of Irelands most resonant international voices, singer-songwriter Dermot Kennedy

programme.title: Rob and Rylans Grand Tour
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Rylan Clark go on a cultural tour of Rome, turning themselves into a painting by Caravaggio, trying to get the classic Grand Tourist look, and discovering the shocking story of the singers known as castrati

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: While researching the Critch family tree, Mark uncovers some dark secrets from the past

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick is in London, the city where he started out as a chef, and now home to 120 world cuisines. In Chinatown, he is entranced by the art of making dim sum and in west London he witnesses the magic of mozzarella making. DJ Stuart Maconie, whos written a book on the Full English, tells Rick about the hilarious variations hes had of our favourite breakfast. At home, Rick cooks beef chow mein

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick spends a second day in London, where brewer Jaega Wise explains why craft beer has become so fashionable. He also learns about Walthamstows silent film studios, and in west London, over a bowl of borscht at a Ukrainian restaurant staffed by refugees, he is reminded of how food creates community

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching For
programme.desc: The actress travels to Andalusia, home of flamenco and tapas, to appreciate the culinary specialities of her favourite region in Spain

programme.title: Licorice Pizza (2021)
programme.desc: In the San Fernando Valley in 1973, 25-year-old Alana Kane is going through the motions as a photographers assistant when 15-year-old child star Gary Valentine makes romantic overtures toward her. Despite the age gap, she agrees to go to dinner with him. Paul Thomas Andersons romantic comedy, starring Alana Haim, Cooper Hoffman, Sean Penn, Tom Waits and Bradley Cooper

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: After realising that one of the passengers might be armed and operating in league with the hackers, Joe desperately tries to work out who he can trust, while Abby decides to turn the tables on the driver by making a last-minute decision to take the train off the mainline. As Joe closes in on the enemy within and Abby manages to catch the sleeper in her trap, will the police be able to get there in time?

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy fights a white developer for his clubs property when is it threatened with being sold to a white developer. Mayme and Elise stage a protest at Margarets school. Crime drama, starring Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: When veteran detective Danny Frater turns up at a hospital mortuary for what he thinks is a routine ID check, he gets a devastating shock. The deceased - a young woman - turns out to be his estranged daughter, Christina. According to the post-mortem report, shes taken her own life. Although the pathologist, Jackie Sowden, insists that the evidence points overwhelmingly toward suicide, Danny refuses to accept her findings, and he forces Jackie to take him through her examination step-by-step. Psychological crime thriller, starring James Nesbitt, Richard E Grant, Ben Miller, Joely Richardson, Anne-Marie Duff, and Niamh Algar

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Detective Danny Frater arrives at the apartment where his estranged daughter Christinas body was found, and manages to get inside. As he carries out a search, he is startled to discover a young woman hiding in the bedroom. Although she does her best to escape, Danny manages to prevent her and forces her to answer his questions. She turns out to be Christinas wife, Nicola, and their subsequent conversation reveals as much about Dannys estrangement from his daughter as it does Christinas increasingly dark and complicated life

Dramabased on Nevil Shutes novel, starring Gregory Peck, Ava Gardner, Fred Astaire and Anthony Perkins

programme.title: Tea with Judi Dench
programme.desc: The actress welcomes long-time friend and sometime collaborator Kenneth Branagh to her country home, where they chat about their lives and careers. programme.desc: Highlights from three of the bands concerts in the 1970s, featuring performances at Brunel University and the New Victoria Theatre in London and on German TV show Rockpalast

programme.title: Paul McCartney and Wings: One Hand Clapping
programme.desc: Documentary filmed over four days at Abbey Road Studios in 1974, revealing the inner workings of the band and featuring performances of Maybe Im Amazed, Jet and Live and Let Die

programme.title: Dire Straits: On the Night
programme.desc: Concert film shot over the course of gigs at Les Arenes in Nimes and the Stadion Feijenoord in Rotterdam during the bands last concert tour. Mark Knopfler and the group perform tracks from their 1991 album On Every Street, as well as hits including Walk of Life, Money for Nothing, Wild Theme and Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: Mark Knopfler: A Life in Songs
programme.desc: Documentary examining the career of the musician, featuring an interview in which he talks about the influence of his life and background on the songs he has written. The programme traces his working life, from his beginnings playing in pubs in Leeds in the 1970s, to his success with Dire Straits and writing of the Brothers in Arms album, as well as his world tour as a solo artist

programme.title: David Bowie: Serious Moonlight
programme.desc: The singer in concert from 1983, filmed in Vancouver, Canada, during the Serious Moonlight Tour - his longest and most successful series of performances to date. Songs include Heroes, Fashion, Lets Dance, Rebel Rebel, Ashes to Ashes, Space Oddity, Young Americans, Fame and Life on Mars?

programme.title: Johnson and Knopflers Music Legends
programme.desc: Brian and Mark meet Cyndi Lauper at New York City recording studio the Power Station, where she discusses her tumultuous career in the music industry and brings her dulcimer along to teach the boys a special arrangement of her classic hit True Colors

programme.title: 27: Gone Too Soon
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the circumstances surrounding the deaths at 27 of Jimi Hendrix, Jim Morrison, Brian Jones, Janis Joplin, Kurt Cobain and Amy Winehouse

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: With a helping hand from the likes of Mavis Staples, Janis Joplin and Chaka Khan, this documentary takes a trip to the 1950s and 60s to the roots of rock n roll

programme.title: Inside Art
programme.desc: Kate Bryan explores a new exhibition showcasing the work of brothers Walter and Harold Steggles, whose pre-Second World pieces are currently being rediscovered

programme.title: Inside Art
programme.desc: A look at the Ruth Borchard collection at Piano Nobile in London, which comprises drawings, watercolours and oil paintings by artists of themselves

programme.title: Sir Bryn Terfel and Friends: Songs of the Sea
programme.desc: Bass-baritone Sir Bryn Terfel transports audiences to his Welsh homeland where the romantic coast becomes the inspiring start of a captivating musical journey

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two archaeologists get less than they bargained for while trying to steal a priceless treasure from a tomb. Starring Nigel Havers and Richard Johnson

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A would-be burglar is confused when his intended victim - an elderly lady - appears to befriend him. Drama, with Siobhan McKenna and Patrick Field

programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Talked with Animals

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man seeks advice from his sponging friend on how to woo his bosss daughter. Drama, starring Michael Kitchen

programme.title: Cirque du Soleil: Volta
programme.desc: A production by the circus troupe based on extreme sports

programme.desc: A 2024 concert by the violinist and his Johann Strauss Orchestra at the Al Dana Amphitheatre in Sakhir

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers

programme.title: Roy Orbison Forever
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the singer-songwriter, charting his career and relationships with other musicians through interviews and archive performances. Featuring interviews with Elvis Costello, Tom Petty, Bono, Gerry Marsden, Jeff Lynne, Olivia Harrison and Barbara Orbison

programme.title: Queen: Champions of the World
programme.desc: The rock band tell their story in their own words, featuring interviews and performance footage, as well as promotional videos and TV appearances

programme.title: Queen - Live at Wembley Stadium
programme.desc: A performance by the band recorded on their 1986 Magic tour, when they were riding the crest of a wave following their triumphant Live Aid performance at the same venue the year before. Including renditions of classic hits Bohemian Rhapsody, I Want to Break Free, We Will Rock You and Radio Ga Ga

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Profile of the singer, featuring interviews with the people who knew him best - his family, former lovers, and the members of Queen. This full and frank portrait charts Freddies life and career, from beginnings in Zanzibar and Feltham, through his outrageous stage performances and recording output, to his death from an Aids-related illness in 1991

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and career of musician and actor David Bowie, who returned to the top of the charts in 2013 with The Next Day, his first album in a decade. Music critics and DJs offer their thoughts on the London-born artists colourful career and enduring success

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: Gregory Porter and his band perform the Grammy-winning Liquid Spirit - his biggest selling album yet - at Londons Middle Eight Hotel

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie looks back on the night that changed everything. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: While attempting to evade the rebels, Joel and Ellie cross paths with the most wanted man in Kansas City. Kathleen continues her hunt

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: As Corrino names a new Bashar, a Sister with deep connections to the emperor arrives on Salusa Secundus, sending ripples through the royal house. After receiving a tip, Desmond goes on a warpath to root out the insurgents, while Tula tries to keep her secret project from being discovered by the other Sisters

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve Coogan is commissioned to review half a dozen restaurants for a Sunday newspaper and plans the trip with his American girlfriend - only to face the prospect of a week of meals-for-one after she dumps him. So Steve calls old friend Rob Brydon to accompany him, and the pair find themselves debating the big questions of life over a series of delightful dishes. Improvised comedy in which the stars play versions of themselves, directed by Michael Winterbottom

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob enjoy a taster menu at LEnclume in the Cumbrian village of Cartmel as they continue their culinary tour of the north of England, reviewing restaurants for a Sunday newspaper. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip

programme.title: The Trip

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: The duo visit Bolton Abbey and eat breakfast at the Angel Inn at Hetton in North Yorkshire. On the journey back to London from their culinary tour of the north of England, they stop off at Steves parents house. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Former detective turned teacher Jackie Ellis discovers the body of 8-year-old pupil Cefin, seemingly drowned. The discovery sends shockwaves through the community, reviving the wounds of an unsolved case that rocked the town three years prior - the disappearance of Jackies niece Nessa, which cost her career. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Old accusations resurface as Jackie and Bull must put aside years of mistrust before the towns tensions ignite into violence. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: When an illicit operation is uncovered, unrest spreads through the town. Jackie and Bull are forced into an uneasy alliance and share information while following separate leads. Jackie uncovers a lie at the heart of the investigation that tore her life apart three years ago, while Bull is forced to wrestle with his intimacy issues. Their fragile partnership is tested when Bull makes a horrifying new discovery

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Jackie struggles after her estranged sister returns and reignites years of guilt and betrayal, while Bull finds himself faced with two cases that are undeniably linked. A confession is made, but he suspects it has been designed to protect someone closer to home, while DNA evidence exposes a devastating truth and both Jackie and Bull must choose between protecting themselves or those they love

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Rising floodwater cuts Morfa Halen off from the world as another body is discovered. Jackie, acting alone, confronts a suspect with explosive consequences and a disappearance shocks the town

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthors former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter escapees to save the day. Animated comedy adventure, featuring the voices of Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Kate McKinnon, Vanessa Bayer and Natasha Lyonne

He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bonds series of childrens books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Paddington 2 (2017)
programme.desc: The lovable little bear has settled into his new life with the Brown family in London, becoming a much-loved member of the local community - until his search for a birthday present for his aunt leads to him being framed as a thief. While the Browns try to clear Paddingtons name, he tries to make himself at home in prison, winning over the other convicts and getting involved in an escape attempt. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Hugh Grant and Sally Hawkins, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids

programme.title: Clash of the Gods

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Part two of two. The story of the key turning point of the Second World War, which started on June 6, 1944. A titanic fleet took on the beaches of Normandy, intent on liberating Europe from Hitlers Nazis. Thanks to the lessons learned from the Dieppe raid of August 1942 and supported by the Provence landing of August 1944, the mission was a spectacular success as the Allies succeeded in moving beyond their political differences, overcoming logistical difficulties and carrying out an operation with unprecedented military stakes

programme.desc: The presenter explores various beliefs surrounding the afterlife, from the traditional concepts of Heaven and Hell to the possibilities of resurrection and reincarnation. With insights from religious scholars, historians and other experts

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: There are some strongholds built to protect the sacred, like an impenetrable wall, an intimidating fortress, or a mystical river. However, while some served as guardians of religious relics and spiritual sites, others were built for far more sinister purposes

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: How secret codes have been embedded in sacred texts, paintings and even etched into the Earth itself. The presenter highlights those who endeavoured to decipher them

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Guy Walters and Justine Ostrowska embark on a 4,000-kilometre journey across Europe, chasing legends of hidden Nazi treasure. From the mines of Germany and the Amber Room mysteries of Czechia, to stolen art in Austria, the Gold Train myths of Poland, bunker hunts in Italy, and the infamous waters of Lake Toplitz, their search combines discovery and eccentric encounters

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Royal B**tards: Rise of the Tudors
programme.desc: Docudrama telling the story of the Wars of the Roses and charting the origins of the Tudor dynasty through the women who shaped the course of English history. The first instalment focuses on Lady Margaret Beaufort, who navigated her way through one of the most turbulent and bloody periods in British history to secure her son a seat on the throne. During the Wars of the Roses, the young mothers life changed when her husband Edmund Tudor died and she was forced to take control of her destiny

programme.title: Royal B**tards: Rise of the Tudors
programme.desc: As the bloody civil wars rage on, Margaret manages to keep hold of her lands and her life under Yorkist rule, while Warwick leads a rebellion against Edward

programme.title: Royal B**tards: Rise of the Tudors
programme.desc: Edward IV dies unexpectedly, throwing the future of England in the air. Richard III makes a grab for power, while Margaret makes her own move

programme.title: Sex: A Bonkers History
programme.desc: Actress Amanda Holden and author and historian Dan Jones explore sexual behaviours during the Victorian era, one of the most sexually progressive societies in history. programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll
