programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Attenboroughs Journey
programme.desc: Documentary following David Attenborough as he journeys around the world to make his series First Life, which explores the origins of life on Earth. As he visits locations including the Great Barrier Reef, the deserts of Morocco and the glaciers of Canada, the broadcaster and wildlife expert explains his life-long fascination with the natural world, and also travels back to Leicestershire, the county in which he spent his childhood

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: Weird, Wild and Wonderful
programme.desc: The natural world is filled with colourful, quaint and quirky characters. It may look crazy, but there are good reasons life got this way. This documentary reveals how, when the name of the game is survival, nothing is too outrageous

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: A look at the ecosystems of six islands, examining how the geology and origins of each have forced the animals that evolved there to interact as they do nowhere else. The first edition looks at the flora and fauna of Canadas Vancouver Island

programme.title: Islands

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: A look at how canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a fight for survival

programme.desc: Alisons at Dublin Zoo to collect baby orangutan Sibu Junior, whose mum failed to take care of him. While back at the park, the chimps get excited over warm pumpkins

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Emotional goodbyes at Dublin Zoo as baby orangutan Sibu Junior sets off for a new home at Monkey World and theres mega moves for the Small Monkey Team

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Disabled chimp Chocolate begins to settle into Bryans group and even makes friends with big girl Ash. Also, its dental day for Stumpy Freddy and its not looking good

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison collects a pet trade Geffroys marmoset in need of a new home and Stumpy Freddy gets a treat to help the medicine go down after dental surgery

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and baby orangutan Sibu enjoy a walk in the park, while primate care staff member Donna is in Spain to collect another rejected orangutan

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan baby Kiwi makes the journey from Spain to Dorset and meets her new companion Sibu. There are concerns for ageing chimp Butch after a vet visit

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the ways different creatures hear and produce sound and how it can influence their decisions, using cutting-edge audio technology to reveal a new perspective and understanding of animal behaviour

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough shares the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk and more use to find a mate - and warn off the competition

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A look at how baby animals communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the early days of life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: Flood waters recede and vast herds of prey return to the Chobes banks, and cameras follow Keeza and her cub as they make a break for it

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In the remote mountains of Patagonia, a female puma has just six months to teach its cubs how to survive in an increasingly competitive world

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: First of two programmes about some of earths most dangerous creatures, which lurk in the oceans, the forests, swamps and deserts. In Australia, meet the worlds most venomous snake, and in nearby oceans, discover the deadly nature of the marine creatures that share these tropical waters

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: Exploring more of earths dangerous creatures, beginning in the South American rainforest with the poison-packed golden dart frog, which harbours enough poison to kill 10 men. Plus, a visit to Sydney, Australia, home of the worlds most venomous spider

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Felines and canids clash across the world. This edition dives into direct battles and strategies to steal food. Intelligence and strength decide who reigns in each territory

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In the remote mountains of Patagonia, a female puma has just six months to teach its cubs how to survive in an increasingly competitive world

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them. Cameras follow wallabies, koolamana lizards and crocodile hatchlings as they face the wild rivers dangers and discover the true power of this waterway

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: Documentary about the European bison, the continents biggest terrestrial mammal, which was hunted to extinction but has been re-introduced thanks to rewilding

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: A visit to Steinhuder Meer, a biodiversity hotspot in Germany, a combination of fenlands, alder march and dunes which create an amazing landscape

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rivals crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Liar Liar (1997)
programme.desc: A lawyer whose underhand ploys to win cases leave him little time to see his son discovers he is incapable of lying after the boys birthday wish makes his dad tell only the truth. However, this causes a host of problems as the attorney tries to muddle his way through a high-profile divorce settlement. Comedy, with Jim Carrey, Maura Tierney, Justin Cooper, Jennifer Tilly and Cary Elwes

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bonds series of childrens books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Paddington 2 (2017)
programme.desc: The lovable little bear has settled into his new life with the Brown family in London, becoming a much-loved member of the local community - until his search for a birthday present for his aunt leads to him being framed as a thief. While the Browns try to clear Paddingtons name, he tries to make himself at home in prison, winning over the other convicts and getting involved in an escape attempt. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Hugh Grant and Sally Hawkins, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: The Smurfs (2011)
programme.desc: The tiny blue forest-dwelling creatures flee from an evil wizard, only to end up magically transported to modern-day New York. They search for a way to get back to their own village while evading their enemy, who has followed them to the Big Apple. Fantasy comedy, with Neil Patrick Harris, Hank Azaria and Jayma Mays, plus voices of Jonathan Winters and Katy Perry

programme.title: The Smurfs 2 (2013)
programme.desc: The tiny blue forest-dwelling creatures and their human friends go on a rescue mission to Paris. Their old foe Gargamel the evil wizard has created mischievous smurfs of his own and kidnapped Smurfette to learn the secret of her magic. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Hank Azaria and Neil Patrick Harris, with the voices of Katy Perry and Christina Ricci

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist, with his young sidekick and a nightclub singer in tow, is stranded in India, where he takes on a mission to recover magical sacred stones from the hands of an evil cult engaged in human sacrifice and child slavery. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan and Amrish Puri

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist sets out to find his estranged father, who has gone missing while searching for the Holy Grail. Once reunited, the duo team up to finish the task and locate the sacred relic before the Nazis get their hands on it. Action adventure sequel directed by Steven Spielberg, the third instalment in the successful franchise. Harrison Ford stars, alongside Sean Connery, Alison Doody, River Phoenix, Julian Glover and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: The Scorpion King (2002)
programme.desc: A ruthless warlord resolves to rid the desert of its few remaining tribes, prompting them to seek the help of a legendary assassin to end the despots reign of terror by destroying his source of power - a beautiful but deadly sorceress. Fantasy action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Steven Brand, Kelly Hu and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. But their quest is hindered by Soviet agents who also want the fabled object for a more sinister purpose. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Peter and Myka investigate the illness of two men who are scheduled to testify in a murder trial and seem to be rapidly regressing to childhood

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group anxiously waits for Shane to return, unaware he is trapped inside a derelict school surrounded by the undead - and with every passing minute, Carl grows weaker, leaving Rick and Lori facing the agonising decision of whether to let Hershel operate without the necessary medical equipment. Meanwhile, Daryl and Andrea search for Sophia in the woods. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Jon Bernthal, Andrew Lincoln and Sarah Wayne Callies

programme.title: De Valera San Fhásach
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary about American-born Irish statesman and political leader Éamon de Valera, a leader in the 1916 Easter Rising. In perhaps, the greatest political U-turn in modern Irish history, De Valera secured a place for Fianna Fáil in the annals of history by accepting the Oath of Allegiance. The women who supported him found themselves in an Ireland, far removed from the vision of equality as laid out in the 1916 proclamation

programme.title: De Valera San Fhásach
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary about American-born Irish statesman and political leader Éamon de Valera, a leader in the 1916 Easter Rising. In perhaps, the greatest political U-turn in modern Irish history, De Valera secured a place for Fianna Fáil in the annals of history by accepting the Oath of Allegiance. The women who supported him found themselves in an Ireland, far removed from the vision of equality as laid out in the 1916 proclamation

programme.title: All and Eva
programme.desc: For 40 years, Eva has remained steadfast in her disbelief in love. Instead, she believes that happiness lies in her love for herself and her friends, a philosophy that has guided her well in her meticulously planned life. After deciding to get pregnant she goes to Copenhagen to select a sperm donor. She later has doubts about her choice, so seeks him out, without revealing why. Architects Ewald and George create a new layout in the house so Josh can move from the front door to the back garden with ease, and task builder Kunle turns the kitchen into a state-of-the-art conservatory so mother and son can cook together for the first time. In the garden, Alan creates a series of different rooms, each designed to appeal to different senses

programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull come up with plans to turn a patch of concrete in Bristol into a relaxing retreat suitable for yoga for for a couple and their two French bulldogs

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull are in Yateley, Hampshire, where they try to turn Julia and Angelas garden filled with builders clutter into a Crete-inspired paradise complete with blue and white hues, pergola, lush greenery, sun-drenched corners and olive trees with a budget of just £6,000

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: The World is Full of Married Men (1979)
programme.desc: Saucy, glossy romp adapted by Jackie Collins from her own novel _ and therefore a bit thin on plot, but bursting with heaving bosoms and heavy jewellery. It tells of an advertising executives decidedly sordid extramarital escapades, and his neglected wife, who eventually gets tried of his philandering _ and decides to take her long-awaited revenge by giving him a well-deserved taste of his own medicine. Starring Anthony Franciosa, Gareth Hunt, Paul Nicholas, Carroll Baker and Georgina Hale.

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team of experts meet Anne and Mike, who have been married for 54 years and for almost a decade have been dealing with Mikes dementia. As his condition has worsened, their house - with its peculiar layout of rooms - has become increasingly difficult to cope with. An even bigger challenge is the garden, which is more than a metre below the house and therefore off-limits to Mike

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The team prepares to host their first charity gala in three years in the castles iconic library. The event involves a clay pigeon shooting competition, followed by a three-course lunch and a big-ticket auction, but staff shortages put them under pressure to deliver the top-notch service that will encourage the guests to dig deep

programme.title: Garden Rescue

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Robert calls out the vet for a ewe in urgent need of care on his croft in the Cairngorms National Park, while Nikki and Ollie head to a local hotel to sample a new dish made from their own rabbit meat. In South Ayrshire, with lambing behind them the Barclays begin preparing their best sheep for show season

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Roberts cattle get their first taste of freedom and fresh grass in the Cairngorms, while Jennis alpacas need a short back and sides from a specialist shearer. In North Uist, a herd is being prepared for an epic journey across a tidal sandbar linking the island of Vallay to the mainland and the crofts bulls. In Moray, Nikki and Ollie are at last about to complete one of their holiday pods

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The Barclay boys are at the Royal Highland Show, where they show their pedigree Beltex and finest Suffolks before going head to head in the Young Handlers competition. Its also a major event for budding young farmers Rachel and Camy, who are pinning their hopes on their Cheviot lamb Patch. Back in Moray, Nikki and Ollie prepare a show of their own as they open their gates to the public

programme.title: Battle of Britain: Empty Skies
programme.desc: A unique insight into what it was really like to be there. Interviews with the pilots, cut with archive footage paint the picture of one of historys greatest ever air battles

programme.title: Puppet on a Chain (1971)
programme.desc: An American narcotics agent is sent to Amsterdam to take down an international heroin smuggling operation. His investigation leads him to discover a connection between the drug dealers and a secretive religious order. Action thriller based on Alistair MacLeans novel, starring Sven-Bertil Taube and Barbara Parkins

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Lee Burkhill and Chris Hull come up with designs for an overgrown garden in the Shropshire town of Telford that is little more than a pile of rubble, drawing inspiration from the travels of owners Rhi and Alex

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, recently married Norline and Wendell are looking for a new garden to relax and socialise in and for Wendell to pursue his passion for cooking. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill affer alternate designs to make their dreams come true. Flos is chosen, and its not long before the team sets about building her garden with touches of the couples Jamaican heritage

programme.title: Fanny Hill (1983)
programme.desc: Happily engaged to her handsome fiance, Charles, Fanny is soon hit with one misfortune after another until she is forced to become a prostitute to survive. This is the story, with many erotic asides, of her struggle to regain her pride in herself and find happiness in life once again. Period drama, starring Oliver Reed, Lisa Foster, Wilfrid Hyde White and Shelley Winters.

programme.title: The Deadly Females (1976)
programme.desc: An apparently respectable middle-class housewife controls a select group of attractive women who moonlight as hired assassins. Rula Lenska stars. Contains nudity.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking

programme.sub-title: The Bathtub Murder of Kendy Howard

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: The case of Earl Linebaugh and Melissa Harris, who were sentenced to life with no parole after the murder of an 84-year-old woman and her 57-year-old care-taker. In 1995, the couple embarked on a multi-state trek from Texas to Mexico, and then to Florida. Now, Melissa claims she is also a victim

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mysterious thief keeps stealing valuable treasures from under his nose, Hercule Flambeau visits Kembleford to see if Father Brown can help him to eliminate the competition. Mark Williams and John Light star in the crime drama

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When renowned concert pianist Pasha Verdinikov is shot dead during an apparent burglary, Neville is quick to conclude that the scene was staged and Pasha was murdered. But the four people under suspicion - the victims family and domestic workers - all have seemingly solid alibis. However, matters are complicated when the discovery of new evidence links the crime to a case from 20 years ago. First of a two-part story, starring Ralf Little and Josephine Jobert

programme.desc: Harry asks Alexa to investigate the case of his friend, who is accused of murdering a survival expert

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a seemingly simple kidnapping ends in murder, Neville and the team must work out what went wrong and how someone wound up dead. Starring Ralf Little and Josephine Jobert

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The arrival of a long-lost brother to a family-run golf club culminates in a body being retrieved from the course. programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a skydiver appears to have been murdered in mid-air, Neville and the team must explore the cut-throat world of social media. Caribbean detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Josephine Jobert and Don Warrington

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Florences undercover role takes a dangerous turn when she finds herself in familiar surroundings, amid a murder investigation. Facing a race against time, Neville sets out to solve the crime. Caribbean detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Josephine Jobert and Don Warrington

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a young pop star is found dead at a rehab clinic, it initially looks like a tragic accident. However, Neville is convinced theres more to her death than meets the eye. Caribbean detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Shantol Jackson

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a woman reports a murder and is then found strangled, the team is left wondering whether she was reporting her own murder. Brilliant-though-slightly neurotic detective Neville Parker attempts to lead this perplexing case. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Josephine Jobert and Don Warrington

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A reggae rap artist is shot dead at a soundcheck for a concert. Things prove uncomfortable for Marlon when he discovers a personal connection to the crime. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Tahj Miles

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.desc: After an explosion, the team must find which nerve agent left one of their own unconscious, while the others explore a tunnel to find a kidnapped friend

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jacks home comforts

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: A simple missing persons case takes a dramatic turn as Frank and Lu find themselves in the middle of a dispute over the opening of a new Shakespeare Centre where its clear that no one is what they seem. Simon Williams and Josie Lawrence guest star

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu are hired to investigate a fire at an award-winning salon, with owner Odette convinced that her old friend and now rival Isobel is behind the blaze and a number of other acts of sabotage. Guest starring Sally Lindsay and Jacqueline Boatswain

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Festive instalment of the detective drama. DI Humphrey Goodman investigates a bizarre set of break-ins where items are left behind rather than taken - and Santa is the number one suspect. The investigation leads to a bittersweet discovery that makes Humphrey and his team reconsider the true meaning of Christmas. Kelby babysits a cheeky young shoplifter, and , Esthers daughter Zoe gets some sage advice from Anne

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Festive instalment of the detective drama. DI Humphrey Goodman investigates a bizarre set of break-ins where items are left behind rather than taken - and Santa is the number one suspect. The investigation leads to a bittersweet discovery that makes Humphrey and his team reconsider the true meaning of Christmas. Kelby babysits a cheeky young shoplifter, and , Esthers daughter Zoe gets some sage advice from Anne

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates a survivalist commune when one of its members is poisoned inside a locked bunker. However, with CCTV footage showing that no one went in or came out while he was in there, it seems likely that he has taken his own life - or has he? Meanwhile, Neville has a series of adventurous dates with Sophie. Robert Webb guest stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A reggae rap artist is shot dead at a soundcheck for a concert. Things prove uncomfortable for Marlon when he discovers a personal connection to the crime. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Tahj Miles

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Throwing Robin off the trail, Harry convinces her that he now knows she was right, seeing Dillon was all in his head. Behind her back, Harry uses the footage he found in the bin as a starting point and is now able to track down the woman and her son to their hire car

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Two brothers go missing from a prestigious boys school and their diplomat parents ask Murdoch to help, so the detective sends Brackenreid and Crabtree in undercover to investigate

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden discover the body of a murdered artist in the woods while they are camping, and the initial investigation leads to a group of landscape painters

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After obituaries are published in advance of two mens deaths, Murdoch discovers more intended victims - including a member of Station House No 4

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: A compilation of extra material from the comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon. Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guests including Claudia Winkleman, Miles Jupp, Bob Mortimer, Jo Brand, Adil Ray, Kirsty Wark, Amanda Abbington and Carol Vorderman to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Host Sandi Toksvig goes to University, joined by panellists Guz Khan, Joe Lycett, Morgana Robinson and Alan Davies

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the weeks news. Sara Pascoe and Katherine Ryan are on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Ill Get This
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones, Scarlett Moffatt, Adil Ray, Angela Scanlon and Janet Street-Porter go out for dinner and play a series of games between courses, with the loser picking up the bill for the whole table

programme.title: Ill Get This
programme.desc: Rob Beckett, Joanna Scanlan, Martin Kemp, Harry Redknapp and Victoria Coren Mitchell go for dinner together. They must place their bank card in the centre of the restaurant table. As the food is served and the drinks flow, they play a series of fun and revealing games, and if they win, they can retrieve their card. The person whose card remains at the end of the evening must pick up the bill for the whole group

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the popularity of sugar-rich foods in Britain, and try to make their own versions of their favourite childhood sweets. The duo also prepare a cheesecake and a sweet-and-sour dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets off on a high-altitude trek from Kathmandu, capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang, a secretive kingdom perched high on the Tibetan plateau, on the far side of the Himalayas. On a five-day expedition through the highest mountains, deepest gorges and harshest terrain on the planet, Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris battle huge river crossings, vast mudslides and dizzying mountain passes on a trip that would test even the hardiest new 4x4s to the limit. But Paddy, Freddie and Chris arent crossing the Himalayas in new 4x4s. Theyre crossing the Himalayas in a small old Peugeot, a very compact old Renault, and Nepals first (and only) home-built car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are sent to Bolivia, where they are challenged to travel through the rainforest and journey to the coast of Chile, driving second-hand off-road vehicles bought locally for a maximum of £3,500 each. Along the way, they encounter drug lords and feel the effects of altitude sickness as they negotiate the regions roads, one of which is a notoriously dangerous 40-mile mountain pass dubbed El Camino de la Muerte - the Death Road

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May head to Norway to find out how a selection of cars fare when taking part in Winter Olympic events. Their experiments include firing a rocket-powered Mini off a ski jump, tackling the biathlon with 4x4s, staging a game of motorised ice hockey and timing the Jaguar XK in a speed-skating race

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Festive edition from 2008 in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on one of the most spectacular road trips they have ever attempted. Arriving in Vietnam, they are challenged to travel the entire length of the country in just eight days. First they must buy suitable transport for the journey, and despite having several million Dong in their pockets, this proves more difficult than they expected, especially in one of the most expensive car markets in the world

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are sent to Bolivia, where they are challenged to travel through the rainforest and journey to the coast of Chile, driving second-hand off-road vehicles bought locally for a maximum of £3,500 each. Along the way, they encounter drug lords and feel the effects of altitude sickness as they negotiate the regions roads, one of which is a notoriously dangerous 40-mile mountain pass dubbed El Camino de la Muerte - the Death Road

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the popularity of sugar-rich foods in Britain, and try to make their own versions of their favourite childhood sweets. The duo also prepare a cheesecake and a sweet-and-sour dish

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore food-related customs associated with wedding ceremonies. The duo help prepare a Scottish breakfast fit for a bride and groom, and highlight traditions behind the star of the nuptial feast - the cake

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Writer Charlie Brooker, Professor Hannah Fry, musician Danny Jones and comedian and author Shaparak Khorsandi join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the offbeat panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds such as Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Gemma Cairney, Tim Key, Gabby Logan and Jeff Stelling test their knowledge in a series of trivia-based games. Their scores are tallied across the week resulting in an overall champion

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: David Baddiel, Alex Brooker, Sophie Duker and Charlotte Hawkins go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games. Their scores are tallied across the week resulting in an overall champion

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Host Sandi Toksvig goes to University, joined by panellists Guz Khan, Joe Lycett, Morgana Robinson and Alan Davies

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The controversial comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to review 2017. A panel of guests is on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: The 64th series concludes with a show dedicated to outgoing Prime Minister Boris Johnson. Jack Dee hosts, with journalist Janet Street-Porter and comedian Phil Wang joining regular team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop on the panel

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Ed Byrne, Sara Pascoe, James Acaster and Gary Delaney join regular panellists Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons to give their irreverent takes on the biggest stories to hit the headlines, through stand-up spots and improvised games. Chaired by Dara O Briain. First aired in 2015

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy decide to attend a marriage counselling session. However, events soon put their relationship under further strain. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig takes a look at the topic of upbringing, with panellists Sally Phillips, Josh Pugh, Aaron Simmonds and Alan Davies

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: A leak from the suspended animation chamber gives the crew a doorway to the past, prompting Lister to race to save lost love Kochanskis life, much to Rimmers fury. Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules, Norman Lovett and Clare Grogan star

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade turns his attention to public transport, as Russell Howard joins him on the Tube to assess the effectiveness of gadgets designed to tackle poor air quality and extreme heat. Richard also takes to the London skies in a cable car to check out mobile entertainment devices, before riding a commuter train with Adam Buxton to test portable cleaning and sanitising devices. The show culminates in the unveiling of a prototype for a driverless taxi

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers create classic puddings and explore the history and traditions behind Britains favourite desserts. They also take part in the world black-pudding throwing competition in Lancashire

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are challenged to build a bridge over the River Kwai in Thailand. In order to do that, however, they have to drive across Burma, a country that has been largely closed to Westerners for more than 40 years, and must make the trip in three lorries, each bought sight unseen from the internet on a limited budget. What follows is an epic journey of beautiful scenery, regular adversity, ongoing malfunction and the constant bickering of the three men

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compare the Mercedes SLS, the Porsche 911 GT3 RS and the Ferrari 458 Italia, as they race against each other in an epic road trip up Americas east coast

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.sub-title: Top Gear: Driving Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Chris Harris, Paddy McGuiness and Freddie Flintoff arent choosing their own cars, but instead choosing for one another. After unwrapping their presents in the Welsh village of Bethlehem, the trio set off on a yuletide trek across Britain, stopping off to play the game of High-Speed Visual Charades and deliver an enormous tree to the Unesco World Heritage city of Bath. Then its time for the presenters to visit the Top Gear test track, transformed into a winter wonderland of speed

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Holly is involved in a duel to the death against the Queeg 500 - the super-strict back-up computer that replaced him after a series of disasters. Sci-fi comedy, starring Norman Lovett, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules and Chris Barrie

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Hollys new invention hurls the crew into a parallel universe inhabited by their opposites, confirming Listers darkest fears, and giving Cat a major shock when he meets his counterpart. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules and Norman Lovett

After unwrapping their presents in the Welsh village of Bethlehem, the trio set off on a yuletide trek across Britain, stopping off to play the game of High-Speed Visual Charades and deliver an enormous tree to the Unesco World Heritage city of Bath. Then its time for the presenters to visit the Top Gear test track, transformed into a winter wonderland of speed

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Jack Carroll, sports broadcaster Gabby Logan, rapper and DJ Big Zuu and comedy actor Bridget Christie join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the offbeat panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds such as Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: A leak from the suspended animation chamber gives the crew a doorway to the past, prompting Lister to race to save lost love Kochanskis life, much to Rimmers fury. Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules, Norman Lovett and Clare Grogan star

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Holly is involved in a duel to the death against the Queeg 500 - the super-strict back-up computer that replaced him after a series of disasters. Sci-fi comedy, starring Norman Lovett, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules and Chris Barrie

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Hollys new invention hurls the crew into a parallel universe inhabited by their opposites, confirming Listers darkest fears, and giving Cat a major shock when he meets his counterpart. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules and Norman Lovett

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Ed Byrne, Josh Widdicombe, Milton Jones, Zoe Lyons and Matt Forde join regulars Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis to give their irreverent takes on the biggest stories to hit the headlines in July 2015, through stand-up spots and improvised games

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy decide to attend a marriage counselling session. However, events soon put their relationship under further strain. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.desc: Clive Myrie hosts an extended edition of the satirical current affairs quiz, with regular team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton joined by Jo Brand and Katy Balls

programme.desc: Ruth accepts an offer of help from Michelle and vows to leave Davey. Meanwhile, Nick tries to find out the underlying cause of a patients distress when she starts suffering from panic attacks, and Archies plans for a romantic night with Melody are thwarted

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: George clashes with a childs mother who is refusing to allow her toddler to have the MMR vaccine, and Ruth returns home to find Davey has left her. Archie is annoyed when he discovers JJ is going to be staying with Melody, but agrees to put his feelings to one side and attempt to get to know him

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Zubin arranges for Ric to be reunited with his estranged son, a situation that becomes complicated when it transpires his girlfriend is six months pregnant and hooked on drugs. When she goes into premature labour, it falls to Jess and Zubin to save the baby. Connie leaves Will to handle an emergency heart operation on his own, but Mickie comes to the rescue, displaying surprising surgical skills. Former EastEnders actress Lucy Speed guest stars as a patient expecting quads

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Adam suspects Warren is being physically abusive toward Kirsty, and a tense confrontation between the two men leads to brutal consequences for her. Jordan is kidnapped at knife point and forced to treat a stab wound on Britney Carter, the cyclist who was injured in the car accident. Meanwhile, Tess tries to convince the others they should support Ruth following her difficulties with Edward

programme.desc: Syed and Christians secret spreads wider when someone stumbles on a tryst. Meanwhile, Ronnie gets a visit from Jacks charming doctor

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: While Syed wonders if Masood saw him with Christian, a terrified Ben finds other ways to get away from his bullies, and Ronnie is chased by a handsome doctor

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: The vets are saddened by the death of George VI, especially as it coincides with the passing away of Mr Potts. Meanwhile, Siegfried decides to help Calum and Deirdre patch things up. Veterinary drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Ken is attacked by James, then challenged to a powerboat race by Leo. Meanwhile, Abby is involved in a terrible road accident

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: An anonymous message invites Frank to join a two-day Shakespearian walk, advising him a crime will be committed. Kitted up, Frank joins the other revellers. However, the idyllic event soon turns to disaster when one of the walkers is murdered and Frank becomes the prime suspect. Lu and Sebastian set about cracking the case in a bid to prove Franks innocence. Mark Benton, Jo Joyner and Patrick Walshe McBride star

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: In a bid to raise some cash for Christmas, Tracey falls back on her typing skills, while Sharon reckons there is a gap in the market for her own unique brand of pet care

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The trio hatch a cunning plan to try to persuade a tight-fisted pub-goer to buy a round of drinks at the local

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Ballad for Wind Instruments and Canoe
programme.desc: The trio stumble across a canoe and decide to take it for an unauthorised trip up the river - but things soon start to go wrong. Meanwhile, Ivy wins a prize for having the best mouth-instrument

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo gets out his old motorbike and tries to perform a few stunts - much to the surprise of Blamire and Clegg. Bill Owen, Michael Bates and Peter Sallis star

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthys friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: After last weeks dramatic cliffhanger, viewers might be forgiven for thinking dedicated Yorkshire sergeant Catherine Cawood had reached the end of the line in Sally Wainwrights dark drama - but with two episodes still to go, its clear the story isnt over yet. The repercussions of the attack are felt far and wide and while Catherine remains critical, Ann is discharged from hospital. The net finally closes in on Kevin and Ashley - but Tommy is still at large. Sarah Lancashire, Steve Pemberton and Siobhan Finneran star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Ricky Hanson faces trial for attempted murder, and his lawyer sets about trying to discredit each member of the squad. However, Jack receives a welcome distraction when an old friend asks him to reinvestigate the death of a wealthy businessman, and he, Brian and Gerry spring into action. Guest starring David Troughton, with Amanda Redman, James Bolam, Alun Armstrong and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The detectives case against a violent criminal is thrown into jeopardy by the murder of a key witness. Determined to secure a conviction, they immerse themselves in the seedy underworld of a seaside town, and as they press for answers, Havers is brought face to face with her childhood memories. Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Fresh DNA tests on an unidentified body found in 1996 reveal a family link to a Home Office fingerprint analyst, who has not seen her brother since she was seven, when he brought her over to the UK from their home country of Albania. The victim had been working as a police interpreter - and the motive seems clear when it turns out his last assignment was translating for a witness in a murder trial against a notorious Albanian criminal. Meanwhile, Gerry embarks on a French cookery course, but the language barrier results in a rather surprising date. Amanda Redman and Dennis Waterman star

programme.desc: A stranger asks for help with a leaking car radiator shortly before police turn up at the house, but it transpires he has a hidden agenda. Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Part two of two. The roguish antiques dealer finds a Scottish gothic temple brings him closer to Lady Jane, while love is in the air for Eric. Ian McShane stars

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A dawn raid by bailiffs leaves the antiques dealer staring ruin in the face, and with nothing left to look forward to, he decides to turn his back on society. With Ian McShane and guest star Alexei Sayle

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The dealer recruits con artists Matron Jackie, Gideon and Henry the Hearse Chaser to attend an auction where he is selling a painting, to purposely bid against each other to bump up the price. However, Lady Jane also bids and after discovering the ruse concocts a plan to get her own back and wipe the smile off Lovejoys face. Charlotte Cornwell guest stars with Ian McShane and Phyllis Logan

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthys friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

The victim had been working as a police interpreter - and the motive seems clear when it turns out his last assignment was translating for a witness in a murder trial against a notorious Albanian criminal. Meanwhile, Gerry embarks on a French cookery course, but the language barrier results in a rather surprising date. Amanda Redman and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: New information links the unexplained death of a market trader to a series of drug rapes in east London - but with that case still ongoing, Ucos officers are unable to question the chief suspect, so they have to look into their victims past in their search for clues. Gerry finds a likely culprit in the shape of the market inspector who clamped his car, while Sandra has problems of a more personal nature when her hated mother arrives for a visit. Sheila Hancock guest stars

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Maddys former colleague starts poking her nose into an unsolved murder at a spooky old house, so the investigative duo tag along. While foraging for clues, Maddy somehow vanishes into thin air, leaving Jonathan to solve her disappearing act and the apparently motiveless killing of an elderly hermit. Alan Davies and Caroline Quentin star, with guest appearances by Jim Bowen and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part One
programme.desc: A popular but tempestuous celebrity chef is murdered during his cookbook launch and there is no shortage of suspects for Judith, Suzie and Becks.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part Two
programme.desc: Police investigate the chefs death but a new development makes them rethink everything they have learned so far. Susan Lynch guest stars.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: After dinosaur fossils are discovered in the foothills of Brokenwood, the town buzzes about the potential boost for tourism. But when a palaeontologist turns up dead, the future doesnt look so rosy

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: Part two of two. A connection to a 16th-century murder seems to confirm someone is killing witches in Whitechapel. Chandler is on the case, but is there a malign influence at work within the team? The police station itself appears to pulsate with unexplained phenomena and even the usually hard-bitten Miles starts to ask questions. Crime thriller, starring Rupert Penry-Jones, Phil Davis and Steve Pemberton

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Lynley and Havers investigate a case at Smithfield Market when a frozen body is found on a meat truck. The victim is carrying a page of parchment written in Arabic and a counterfeit British passport. A number of suspects emerge, including a dealer in antiquities, a forger, and a surgeon who may have been selling human organs. With Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Mark Benton

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new midwife joins the team as the area is rocked by power cuts and blizzards. The new arrival is delayed by the weather and falls ill as soon as she arrives. However, she is quickly dragged from her sick bed to assist with a difficult birth. Nurse Crane and Dr Turner treat an elderly cancer patient who faces losing her house due to slum clearances, and try to convince Sergeant Woolf to allow her to die at home

programme.title: A Small Light
programme.desc: Drama inspired by the true story of the Dutch couple who risked their lives to hide Anne Frank and her family, and other persecuted Jews, during the Second World War. Miep Gies (Bel Powley) works as a secretary to Otto Frank (Liev Schreiber) in Amsterdam as the city comes under Nazi occupation. Otto fears for the safety of his loved ones and decides to hide in the secret annexe of his business premises along with members of the van Pels and Pfeffer families. Miep, her husband Jan (Joe Cole) and other brave souls agree to watch over the fugitives and keep them safe from the Nazis for the next two years

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A stranger asks for help with a leaking car radiator shortly before police turn up at the house, but it transpires he has a hidden agenda. Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson star

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: When Mattie investigates a murder at Wildemarsh Wellness Retreat, she finds several people with distinctly unhealthy intentions

programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry advertises his snooker table for sale in the local paper, but a mix-up over telephone numbers leads him to think he has a priceless piece of property on his hands. Jack Haig guest stars

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: An old costume proves to be Terrys undoing when he is persuaded to dress up for a dinner party

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: June is furious when Terry - who has refused to help her in the garden - is only too keen to assist attractive neighbour Cynthia lay paving slabs. Jo Rowbottom guest stars

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A supposedly restful weekend at nephew Alans country pub leaves the couple anxious to get home. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The couple are looking forward to an all-expenses-paid weekend away on behalf of Sir Dennis. However, Terry falls ill risking their chance to enjoy the occasion. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The duo win a giant jigsaw, which proves to be a dangerous pastime, especially when a vital piece goes missing. Adding to Terrys misery is the fact that work colleague Malcolm has saddled him with analysis of an important report - without a set of crucial figures. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry advertises his snooker table for sale in the local paper, but a mix-up over telephone numbers leads him to think he has a priceless piece of property on his hands. Jack Haig guest stars

programme.desc: Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady whos been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner whos fallen in her bedroom

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer embarks on a journey across the country, meeting a diverse array of people and encountering exotic wildlife. He begins in Northern Territory, where he discovers how the camel is threatening the fragile desert ecosystem, then heads through wine country to the South Australian city of Port Lincoln to dive with critically endangered southern blue fin tuna. In Western Australia, he joins a 21st-century gold rush and ends his first leg in state capital Perth, where he meets a former binman from Hull who now has a house in the sun, a private pool and his own boat

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The author and adventurer continues his Australian journey in Kakadu, the countrys largest national park, where he works through the night with a team committed to culling the poisonous feral cane toads that are threatening the regions wildlife. He then learns how to survive off the land using ancient Aboriginal knowledge as he heads out on patrol with a unique military unit in the remote northern Bush, before attempting to catch box jellyfish on Cape York Peninsula with a group of scientists who believe the species deadly venom may have medicinal qualities. Finally, Simon flies 100 miles out over the ocean to watch a large tanker being guided through the Great Barrier Reef

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer meets members of one of the most notorious and feared motorcycle gangs in Gold Coast, before heading to the suburbs to meet a vet and his team rescuing and treating injured koalas. In Sydney, he chats to a billionaire who made his fortune in housing for new migrants from Asia and visits the countrys first Muslim womens Australian rules football team. On the last leg of his journey, Simon takes to the air to witness devastating and deadly fires ripping through the Bush, before celebrating Australia Day at his final destination of Melbourne

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor Meldrew finds himself forced into early retirement, but is determined not to end up on the scrapheap, pouring scorn on the modern world and driving everybody crazy in the process. Richard Wilson stars in the first-ever episode as misery guts Meldrew, with Annette Crosbie as his long-suffering wife. From 1990

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to take Victors mind off his depressing situation by encouraging him to attend a fitness class and read a book on how to cope with old age. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household is disrupted by a pesky plumber whose penchant for morbid practical jokes would try the patience of a saint. Victor decides its time to call a neighbourhood watch system after hes mugged and graffiti is spray painted on the side of the Meldrews house. David Renwicks award-winning comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are trapped in the shed by a swarm of bees - and not unexpectedly where the mishap-prone Meldrews are concerned, that is just the start of their troubles. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Speckled Band
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are packing for a holiday in Athens - but their preparations are delayed by an unhelpful electricity board representative, as well as an escaped snake. Starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie, with Clive Mantle

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses advanced surveillance technology to observe the feeding habits of herbivores, including elephants forced to undertake epic migrations to ensure a steady diet of the plants they need to survive. He also considers the habits of the sloth, which takes a month to digest each meal, and reveals scientific research suggesting that grazing wildebeest do not follow the rains as originally thought, but detect trails of phosphorus in the grass

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A supposedly restful weekend at nephew Alans country pub leaves the couple anxious to get home. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The couple are looking forward to an all-expenses-paid weekend away on behalf of Sir Dennis. However, Terry falls ill risking their chance to enjoy the occasion. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The duo win a giant jigsaw, which proves to be a dangerous pastime, especially when a vital piece goes missing. Adding to Terrys misery is the fact that work colleague Malcolm has saddled him with analysis of an important report - without a set of crucial figures. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.desc: Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady whos been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner whos fallen in her bedroom

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer embarks on a journey across the country, meeting a diverse array of people and encountering exotic wildlife. He begins in Northern Territory, where he discovers how the camel is threatening the fragile desert ecosystem, then heads through wine country to the South Australian city of Port Lincoln to dive with critically endangered southern blue fin tuna. In Western Australia, he joins a 21st-century gold rush and ends his first leg in state capital Perth, where he meets a former binman from Hull who now has a house in the sun, a private pool and his own boat

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The author and adventurer continues his Australian journey in Kakadu, the countrys largest national park, where he works through the night with a team committed to culling the poisonous feral cane toads that are threatening the regions wildlife. He then learns how to survive off the land using ancient Aboriginal knowledge as he heads out on patrol with a unique military unit in the remote northern Bush, before attempting to catch box jellyfish on Cape York Peninsula with a group of scientists who believe the species deadly venom may have medicinal qualities. Finally, Simon flies 100 miles out over the ocean to watch a large tanker being guided through the Great Barrier Reef

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer meets members of one of the most notorious and feared motorcycle gangs in Gold Coast, before heading to the suburbs to meet a vet and his team rescuing and treating injured koalas. In Sydney, he chats to a billionaire who made his fortune in housing for new migrants from Asia and visits the countrys first Muslim womens Australian rules football team. On the last leg of his journey, Simon takes to the air to witness devastating and deadly fires ripping through the Bush, before celebrating Australia Day at his final destination of Melbourne

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave

Richard Wilson stars in the first-ever episode as misery guts Meldrew, with Annette Crosbie as his long-suffering wife. From 1990

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to take Victors mind off his depressing situation by encouraging him to attend a fitness class and read a book on how to cope with old age. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household is disrupted by a pesky plumber whose penchant for morbid practical jokes would try the patience of a saint. Victor decides its time to call a neighbourhood watch system after hes mugged and graffiti is spray painted on the side of the Meldrews house. David Renwicks award-winning comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are trapped in the shed by a swarm of bees - and not unexpectedly where the mishap-prone Meldrews are concerned, that is just the start of their troubles. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines the world of rodents, whose constantly growing incisor teeth are used to chisel through any obstacle and range from squirrels and the English harvest mouse to the large South American capybara. He looks at examples of their dental prowess, showing how agoutis in Panama break open rock-hard nutshells and the skills employed by beavers in Wyoming as they fell massive trees to build dams rivalling feats of human engineering

programme.desc: Stage show of the riotous sitcom, made in 2003. Eddie has locked himself away in the toilet and Richie discovers hes been inventing gadgets - only to then find himself joining his chum on an adventure through time and space on-board Eddies time machine The Turdis. Starring Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy about the romance between a couple with differing cultures and backgrounds. Gavin and Stacey have flirted for months on the phone at work but have never met up - until she travels from Wales to London to see him. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star alongside Rob Brydon, Alison Steadman, Ruth Jones and James Corden

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tonys incessant witticisms during an episode of Star Trek provoke a plot to humiliate him, which ends up forcing him to hide out in the water tank in the loft. Comedy, starring Neil Morrissey and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Joe Maplin demotes Gladys and replaces her with a new supervisor, who requires her own chalet - throwing the accommodation situation into chaos. Comedy, starring Simon Cadell and Ruth Madoc

programme.desc: Classic sketch show featuring the many guises of Harry Enfield, Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke, including Smashie and Nicey, Kevin the Teenager, and The Slobs

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.desc: The day of the wedding arrives and Bryn is still behaving oddly around Staceys brother. programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: The Browns await the fruits of their fraud after faking Grandads death to get a payout, but the insurance company starts to grow suspicious. Agnes struggles to keep him out of sight, as she has promised the money to Dermot and Maria, who are desperate to get a place of their own

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is upset that Trevor has decided to work for a mission project in Africa, and resolves to give him an unforgettable send-off to remind him of the loving family he has in Ireland. Cathys family counselling session descends into chaos, Buster and Dermot land themselves in trouble because of a circus lion, and neighbour Winnie is delighted that her husbands libido has returned. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: The boys join Mrs Linekers Love Bureau hoping to find their perfect love matches. Richies video tells the potential suitors that he is, in fact, a duke and this secures him a date with a countess from Moldavia. Undeterred, he invites her to his place and arranges for Eddie to pretend to be his butler for the evening. Chaotic comedy, written by and starring Adrian Edmondson and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Richie and Eddies TV is repossessed, giving them ample opportunity to amuse themselves with a series of violent tit-for-tat assaults thinly disguised as games. Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson star

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Tom finds himself suffering a bad back during harvest time, which leaves Barbara to do all the work on her own - a situation made worse by the terrible weather. Sitcom, starring Richard Briers, Felicity Kendal, Paul Eddington and Penelope Keith

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes gets the wrong end of the stick and fears her relatives are planning to send her to a nursing home. Furious, she sets out to persuade them she is not going senile - unaware it is actually Spartacus the dog who is set to be sent away. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to celebrate the 20th anniversary of Live Aid, but it soon becomes apparent members of her flock are less enthusiastic and somewhat out of touch. However, that is not the only landmark on the horizon - the reverends 40th birthday is also approaching. Dawn French stars

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.desc: First edition of the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedian as an assortment of quirky and oddball characters, including a woman frightened of her own shadow, the wife of a cannibal on death row, a couple with a unique approach to parenting, an Irish nurse who will not let patients come between her and her twin passions, and a teenager who would rather be right than happy.
